summary: This paper addresses the classic problem of parameter estimation (PE) in multimachine power system models. Such models are typically described by a set of nonlinear differential-algebraic equations (DAE), where generator physics and network power flow equations are coupled. DAE models are well established in classic power system textbooks, but parameter identification and estimation of generator inertia and damping together with network branch resistances and reactances for these models remain relatively underexplored. In contrast to prior approaches that rely on ODE approximations, this paper develops a joint Bayesian inference framework to perform PE of generator and network parameters while exploiting grid DAE models. It further combines physics-aware statistical modeling with computationally efficient posterior sampling to make joint Bayesian calibration practical. Results on the IEEE 9-bus system show accurate parameter recovery with well-behaved posterior uncertainty, while a short 39-bus study provides evidence that the framework remains effective on a materially larger joint-estimation problem. These results are obtained without requiring overly conservative priors.

AI.tldr: 本文针对多机电力系统模型中的参数估计问题，提出了一个联合贝叶斯推断框架，利用电网微分代数方程模型同时估计发电机和网络参数，并通过物理感知统计建模与高效后验采样实现实用化。
AI.motivation: 电力系统模型通常由非线性微分代数方程描述，但发电机惯量、阻尼以及网络支路电阻、电抗等参数的辨识与估计研究相对不足。现有方法多依赖ODE近似，缺乏对完整DAE模型的利用。
AI.method: 开发了联合贝叶斯推断框架，结合物理感知统计建模与计算高效的后验采样方法，直接基于电网DAE模型进行发电机和网络参数的联合估计。
AI.result: 在IEEE 9总线系统上实现了准确的参数恢复，后验不确定性表现良好；在39总线系统的初步研究中，框架在更大规模的联合估计问题上仍保持有效性，且无需过于保守的先验假设。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的联合贝叶斯校准框架能够有效处理电力系统DAE模型的参数估计问题，为多机系统的参数辨识提供了实用且可扩展的解决方案。

title: Factor Graph-Based Shape Estimation for Continuum Robots via Magnus Expansion
summary: Reconstructing the shape of continuum manipulators from sparse, noisy sensor data is a challenging task, owing to the infinite-dimensional nature of such systems. Existing approaches broadly trade off between parametric methods that yield compact state representations but lack probabilistic structure, and Cosserat rod inference on factor graphs, which provides principled uncertainty quantification at the cost of a state dimension that grows with the spatial discretization. This letter combines the strength of both paradigms by estimating the coefficients of a low-dimensional Geometric Variable Strain (GVS) parameterization within a factor graph framework. A novel kinematic factor, derived from the Magnus expansion of the strain field, encodes the closed-form rod geometry as a prior constraint linking the GVS strain coefficients to the backbone pose variables. The resulting formulation yields a compact state vector directly amenable to model-based control, while retaining the modularity, probabilistic treatment and computational efficiency of factor graph inference. The proposed method is evaluated in simulation on a 0.4 m long tendon-driven continuum robot under three measurement configurations, achieving mean position errors below 2 mm for all three scenarios and demonstrating a sixfold reduction in orientation error compared to a Gaussian process regression baseline when only position measurements are available.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合低维几何参数化与因子图推理的方法，用于从稀疏噪声传感器数据重建连续体机械臂形状，实现紧凑状态表示与概率不确定性量化。
AI.motivation: 现有连续体机械臂形状重建方法存在矛盾：参数化方法状态紧凑但缺乏概率结构，因子图方法能量化不确定性但状态维度随离散化增长。需要结合两者优势。
AI.method: 在因子图框架中估计低维几何可变应变（GVS）参数化系数，通过基于马格努斯展开推导的新型运动学因子，将应变系数与骨架位姿变量关联为约束先验。
AI.result: 在0.4米肌腱驱动连续体机器人仿真中，三种测量配置下平均位置误差均低于2毫米；仅使用位置测量时，方向误差比高斯过程回归基线降低六倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持因子图模块化、概率处理和计算效率的同时，实现了紧凑状态表示，可直接用于基于模型的控制，为连续体机械臂形状估计提供了新框架。

title: AdaVFM: Adaptive Vision Foundation Models for Edge Intelligence via LLM-Guided Execution
summary: Language-aligned vision foundation models (VFMs) enable versatile visual understanding for always-on contextual AI, but their deployment on edge devices is hindered by strict latency and power constraints. We present AdaVFM, an adaptive framework for efficient on-device inference of language-aligned VFMs that dynamically adjusts computation based on scene context and task complexity. Our key insight is that the effect of model size reduction on performance is task-dependent in vision applications, motivating a runtime-adaptive execution strategy. AdaVFM integrates neural architecture search (NAS) into the language-aligned VFM backbone to enable lightweight subnet execution during runtime. A multimodal large language model (LLM) deployed on the cloud enables runtime control with a context-aware agent. This synergy allows efficient model adaptation under diverse conditions while maintaining strong accuracy. Extensive experiments on zero-shot classification and open-vocabulary segmentation demonstrate that AdaVFM achieves state-of-the-art accuracy-efficiency trade-offs, surpassing prior baselines by up to $7.9\%$ in acc@1 on IN1K and $5.2\%$ mIoU on ADE20K over the best models of comparable VFM sizes. For models with similar accuracy, AdaVFM further reduces average FLOPs by up to $77.9\%$.

AI.tldr: AdaVFM是一个自适应框架，通过动态调整计算资源来优化语言对齐视觉基础模型在边缘设备上的推理效率，实现精度与效率的最佳平衡。
AI.motivation: 语言对齐视觉基础模型在边缘设备部署时面临严格的延迟和功耗限制，需要一种能根据场景上下文和任务复杂度动态调整计算的方法。
AI.method: 将神经架构搜索集成到VFM主干中，支持运行时轻量子网执行；利用云端多模态大语言模型作为上下文感知代理进行运行时控制。
AI.result: 在零样本分类和开放词汇分割任务中，AdaVFM在可比VFM尺寸下，IN1K准确率提升7.9%，ADE20K mIoU提升5.2%；同等精度下平均FLOPs减少高达77.9%。
AI.conclusion: AdaVFM通过任务自适应的运行时执行策略，显著提升了语言对齐视觉基础模型在边缘设备上的部署效率，同时保持了强大的准确性。

title: The World Leaks the Future: Harness Evolution for Future Prediction Agents
summary: Many consequential decisions must be made before the relevant outcome is known. Such problems are commonly framed as future prediction, where an LLM agent must form a prediction for an unresolved question using only the public information available at the prediction time. The setting is difficult because public evidence evolves while useful supervision arrives only after the question is resolved, so most existing approaches still improve mainly from final outcomes. Yet final outcomes are too coarse to guide earlier factor tracking, evidence gathering and interpretation, or uncertainty handling. When the same unresolved question is revisited over time, temporal contrasts between earlier and later predictions can expose omissions in the earlier prediction process; we call this signal internal feedback. We introduce Milkyway, a self-evolving agent system that keeps the base model fixed and instead updates a persistent future prediction harness for factor tracking, evidence gathering and interpretation, and uncertainty handling. Across repeated predictions on the same unresolved question, Milkyway extracts internal feedback and writes reusable guidance back into the harness, so later predictions on that question can improve before the outcome is known. After the question is resolved, the final outcome provides a retrospective check before the updated harness is carried forward to subsequent questions. On FutureX and FutureWorld, Milkyway achieves the best overall score among the compared methods, improving FutureX from 44.07 to 60.90 and FutureWorld from 62.22 to 77.96.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Milkyway系统，一种自进化的未来预测代理，通过内部反馈机制在问题未解决时持续改进预测过程，而无需修改基础模型。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖最终结果进行改进，但最终结果过于粗糙，无法有效指导早期因素追踪、证据收集与解释以及不确定性处理。
AI.method: Milkyway系统保持基础模型固定，更新持久化的未来预测工具链（包括因素追踪、证据收集与解释、不确定性处理），通过时间对比提取内部反馈，并将可重用指导写入工具链。
AI.result: 在FutureX和FutureWorld数据集上，Milkyway取得了最佳综合得分，分别将FutureX从44.07提升至60.90，FutureWorld从62.22提升至77.96。
AI.conclusion: 内部反馈机制使预测系统能在问题未解决时持续自我改进，最终结果仅作为回顾性检查，更新后的工具链可迁移至后续问题。

title: Integrating AI and Simulation for Teaching Power System Dynamics: An Interactive Framework for Engineering Education
summary: Artificial Intelligence (AI), especially cloud platforms and large language models (LLMs), is changing how engineering is taught by making learning more interactive and flexible. However, in electrical engineering and energy systems, students often find power system dynamics difficult to understand because the concepts are abstract, math-heavy, and there are limited opportunities for hands-on practice. This paper presents an AI-based interactive learning framework that combines simulation with intelligent feedback to improve understanding and student engagement. The framework has three connected parts: an AI layer that provides explanations and guidance, a simulation layer that models system behavior, and a user layer that allows students to interact with the system in real time. These parts work together in a continuous loop where students explore how the system behaves, change parameters, and receive feedback based on the results. The paper also provides a step-by-step process to help educators design and apply AI-supported learning environments, including breaking down concepts, using simulations, and assessing performance. This method helps students learn through practice and better understand how ideas from class apply to real power systems. It also provides a practical way to improve electrical engineering education and helps students get ready to use AI tools carefully and responsibly in engineering.

AI.tldr: 提出一个基于AI的交互式学习框架，结合仿真与智能反馈，以解决电气工程中学生对电力系统动态概念理解困难的问题。
AI.motivation: 电气工程与能源系统教学中，学生常因概念抽象、数学复杂且缺乏实践机会，难以掌握电力系统动态知识；AI与大型语言模型的发展为改善工程教育提供了新机遇。
AI.method: 构建三层框架：AI层（提供解释与指导）、仿真层（模拟系统行为）、用户层（实时交互）；设计闭环学习流程，支持学生探索系统、调整参数并获取反馈；提出教育者分步实施指南，包括概念分解、仿真应用与效果评估。
AI.result: 框架通过仿真与智能反馈的融合，增强了学生对抽象概念的理解与实践能力，提升了学习参与度；为工程教育中负责任地使用AI工具提供了可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 该AI交互式学习框架能有效促进电气工程教育的实践性与应用性，帮助学生将理论知识与实际系统结合，并为AI在工程教育中的合理应用提供实践范例。

title: Contact-Aware Planning and Control of Continuum Robots in Highly Constrained Environments
summary: Continuum robots are well suited for navigating confined and fragile environments, such as vascular or endoluminal anatomy, where contact with surrounding structures is often unavoidable. While controlled contact can assist motion, unfavorable contact can degrade controllability, induce kinematic singularities, or introduce safety risks. We present a contact-aware planning approach that evaluates contact quality, penalizing hazardous interactions, while permitting benign contact. The planner produces kinematically feasible trajectories and contact-aware Jacobians which can be used for closed-loop control in hardware experiments. We validate the approach by testing the integrated system (planning, control, and mechanical design) on anatomical models from patient scans. The planner generates effective plans for three common anatomical environments, and, in all hardware trials, the continuum robot was able to reach the target while avoiding dangerous tip contact (100% success). Mean tracking errors were 1.9 +/- 0.5 mm, 1.2 +/- 0.1 mm, and 1.7 +/- 0.2 mm across the three different environments. Ablation studies showed that penalizing end-of-continuum-segment (ECS) contact improved manipulability and prevented hardware failures. Overall, this work enables reliable, contact-aware navigation in highly constrained environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种接触感知的连续体机器人路径规划方法，能在受限解剖环境中区分危险与良性接触，通过硬件实验验证了其在三种解剖模型中的有效性，成功率达100%。
AI.motivation: 连续体机器人在血管或腔内解剖等受限脆弱环境中运动时，接触难以避免。不良接触可能导致可控性下降、运动学奇异或安全风险，需要区分接触类型以实现安全导航。
AI.method: 开发接触感知规划器，评估接触质量并惩罚危险交互；生成运动学可行轨迹和接触感知雅可比矩阵；在基于患者扫描的解剖模型上进行集成系统（规划、控制与机械设计）实验验证。
AI.result: 在三种解剖环境中均生成有效路径；硬件实验中机器人成功抵达目标且避免危险尖端接触（成功率100%）；平均跟踪误差分别为1.9±0.5mm、1.2±0.1mm、1.7±0.2mm；消融研究表明惩罚末端接触可提升可操纵性并防止硬件故障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了高度受限环境中可靠、接触感知的导航，通过区分接触类型平衡了运动效率与安全性，为临床解剖环境中的机器人应用提供了解决方案。

title: LLM attribution analysis across different fine-tuning strategies and model scales for automated code compliance
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures. Accepted at ICCCBE 2026 (International Conference on Computing in Civil and Building Engineering)
summary: Existing research on large language models (LLMs) for automated code compliance has primarily focused on performance, treating the models as black boxes and overlooking how training decisions affect their interpretive behavior. This paper addresses this gap by employing a perturbation-based attribution analysis to compare the interpretive behaviors of LLMs across different fine-tuning strategies such as full fine-tuning (FFT), low-rank adaptation (LoRA) and quantized LoRA fine-tuning, as well as the impact of model scales which include varying LLM parameter sizes. Our results show that FFT produces attribution patterns that are statistically different and more focused than those from parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods. Furthermore, we found that as model scale increases, LLMs develop specific interpretive strategies such as prioritizing numerical constraints and rule identifiers in the building text, albeit with performance gains in semantic similarity of the generated and reference computer-processable rules plateauing for models larger than 7B. This paper provides crucial insights into the explainability of these models, taking a step toward building more transparent LLMs for critical, regulation-based tasks in the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction industry.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过扰动归因分析比较不同微调策略和模型规模下大语言模型在代码合规检查中的解释行为差异，发现全微调产生更聚焦的归因模式，且模型增大时会发展特定解释策略。
AI.motivation: 现有研究将大语言模型视为黑箱，仅关注性能而忽略训练决策对其解释行为的影响，缺乏对模型可解释性的深入理解，特别是在建筑、工程和建造行业等关键监管任务中需要更透明的模型。
AI.method: 采用基于扰动的归因分析方法，比较全微调、低秩适应和量化低秩适应等不同微调策略，以及不同参数规模的模型在代码合规任务中的解释行为差异。
AI.result: 全微调产生的归因模式在统计上不同于参数高效微调方法且更聚焦；模型规模增大时，大语言模型会发展出优先处理数值约束和规则标识符等特定解释策略，但超过70亿参数后生成规则与参考规则的语义相似度性能提升趋于平缓。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了不同训练配置下大语言模型的解释行为差异，为构建更透明、适用于关键监管任务的大语言模型提供了重要见解，推动了建筑、工程和建造行业自动化代码合规检查的可解释性发展。

title: SIMMER: Cross-Modal Food Image--Recipe Retrieval via MLLM-Based Embedding
summary: Cross-modal retrieval between food images and recipe texts is an important task with applications in nutritional management, dietary logging, and cooking assistance. Existing methods predominantly rely on dual-encoder architectures with separate image and text encoders, requiring complex alignment strategies and task-specific network designs to bridge the semantic gap between modalities. In this work, we propose SIMMER (Single Integrated Multimodal Model for Embedding Recipes), which applies Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM)-based embedding models, specifically VLM2Vec, to this task, replacing the conventional dual-encoder paradigm with a single unified encoder that processes both food images and recipe texts. We design prompt templates tailored to the structured nature of recipes, which consist of a title, ingredients, and cooking instructions, enabling effective embedding generation by the MLLM. We further introduce a component-aware data augmentation strategy that trains the model on both complete and partial recipes, improving robustness to incomplete inputs. Experiments on the Recipe1M dataset demonstrate that SIMMER achieves state-of-the-art performance across both the 1k and 10k evaluation settings, substantially outperforming all prior methods. In particular, our best model improves the 1k image-to-recipe R@1 from 81.8\% to 87.5\% and the 10k image-to-recipe R@1 from 56.5\% to 65.5\% compared to the previous best method.

AI.tldr: 提出SIMMER模型，使用单模态大语言模型统一编码食物图像和食谱文本，在跨模态检索任务中取得最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖双编码器架构，需要复杂对齐策略和任务特定设计来弥合模态语义鸿沟，因此探索更统一的跨模态表示方法。
AI.method: 基于VLM2Vec构建单编码器模型，设计针对食谱结构化内容（标题、食材、步骤）的提示模板，并提出组件感知数据增强策略以提升对不完整输入的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在Recipe1M数据集上，1k和10k评估设置均达到最优：1k图像到食谱R@1从81.8%提升至87.5%，10k图像到食谱R@1从56.5%提升至65.5%。
AI.conclusion: 单编码器MLLM方法能有效统一处理多模态食物数据，通过结构化提示和数据增强显著提升跨模态检索性能，为相关应用提供新范式。

title: DALM: A Domain-Algebraic Language Model via Three-Phase Structured Generation
summary: Large language models compress heterogeneous knowledge into a single parameter space, allowing facts from different domains to interfere during generation. We propose DALM, a Domain-Algebraic Language Model that replaces unconstrained token generation with structured denoising over a domain lattice. DALM follows a three-phase generation path: it first resolves domain uncertainty, then relation uncertainty, and finally concept uncertainty, so each stage operates under explicit algebraic constraints. The framework requires only three ingredients: a lattice of domains with computable meet, join, and implication; a typing function over relations that controls inheritance across domains; and a fiber partition that localizes knowledge to domain-specific subsets. Given these ingredients, DALM yields a three-phase encoder-decoder architecture in which generation is confined to a domain fiber, cross-domain contamination is structurally prevented in closed-vocabulary mode and auditably bounded in open-vocabulary mode, and a single query can produce a domain-indexed multi-perspective answer space. We instantiate the framework with the CDC knowledge representation system and outline training and evaluation on validated domain-annotated crystal libraries. DALM reframes language generation as algebraically constrained structured denoising rather than unconstrained decoding over a flat token space.

AI.tldr: 提出DALM（领域代数语言模型），通过结构化去噪在领域格上生成文本，以解决大语言模型中不同领域知识相互干扰的问题。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型将异构知识压缩到单一参数空间，导致不同领域事实在生成过程中相互干扰，影响生成内容的准确性和领域特异性。
AI.method: 采用三阶段生成路径：先解决领域不确定性，再解决关系不确定性，最后解决概念不确定性；基于领域格、类型化关系和纤维划分构建代数约束的编码器-解码器架构。
AI.result: DALM能将生成过程限制在特定领域纤维中，结构上防止跨领域污染，支持单查询生成多视角答案空间，并在CDC知识表示系统上进行了实例化验证。
AI.conclusion: DALM将语言生成重新定义为代数约束的结构化去噪过程，而非在平坦标记空间上的无约束解码，为可控、可审计的领域感知生成提供了新框架。

title: LLM Reasoning Is Latent, Not the Chain of Thought
summary: This position paper argues that large language model (LLM) reasoning should be studied as latent-state trajectory formation rather than as faithful surface chain-of-thought (CoT). This matters because claims about faithfulness, interpretability, reasoning benchmarks, and inference-time intervention all depend on what the field takes the primary object of reasoning to be. We ask what that object should be once three often-confounded factors are separated and formalize three competing hypotheses: H1, reasoning is primarily mediated by latent-state trajectories; H2, reasoning is primarily mediated by explicit surface CoT; and H0, most apparent reasoning gains are better explained by generic serial compute than by any privileged representational object. Reorganizing recent empirical, mechanistic, and survey work under this framework, and adding compute-audited worked exemplars that factorize surface traces, latent interventions, and matched budget expansions, we find that current evidence most strongly supports H1 as a default working hypothesis rather than as a task-independent verdict. We therefore make two recommendations: the field should treat latent-state dynamics as the default object of study for LLM reasoning, and it should evaluate reasoning with designs that explicitly disentangle surface traces, latent states, and serial compute.

AI.tldr: 本文主张将大语言模型的推理视为潜在状态轨迹形成而非表面思维链的忠实反映，提出了三种竞争假设，并通过实证分析支持将潜在状态动态作为默认研究对象。
AI.motivation: 当前关于大语言模型推理的忠实性、可解释性、基准测试和推理时干预的讨论，都依赖于对推理本质的理解。本文旨在澄清这一本质，区分常被混淆的表面思维链、潜在状态和串行计算三个因素。
AI.method: 通过形式化三种竞争假设（H1：推理主要由潜在状态轨迹介导；H2：推理主要由表面思维链介导；H0：推理增益主要由通用串行计算解释），重组现有实证、机制和调查研究成果，并引入计算审计的工作示例来分解表面痕迹、潜在干预和匹配的计算预算扩展。
AI.result: 当前证据最强烈支持H1作为默认工作假设，即推理主要由潜在状态轨迹介导，而非表面思维链或通用串行计算。
AI.conclusion: 建议领域将潜在状态动态作为大语言模型推理的默认研究对象，并在评估推理时采用能明确区分表面痕迹、潜在状态和串行计算的设计。

title: QGas: Interactive Gas Infrastructure Toolkit
summary: Gas infrastructure datasets are essential inputs for energy system planning to support strategic decision-making toward decarbonization. However, relevant data are typically scattered across heterogeneous sources, including geospatial datasets, image-based infrastructure plans, and tabular data, making it complex, time-consuming, and error-prone to create topology-consistent network representations with existing tools.This paper presents QGas, an interactive toolkit for visualizing, creating, and collaboratively extending georeferenced gas infrastructure datasets. QGas integrates GIS-based geometry editing with topology-preserving graph operations in a unified web-based environment, enabling users to digitize infrastructure plans, edit network elements, manage attributes, and perform topology-consistent modifications while maintaining a georeferenced representation of the system. The toolkit is implemented using a modular architecture based on Python, JavaScript, and the Leaflet mapping library. An illustrative example demonstrates its application in extending a natural gas dataset to include hydrogen and CO2 infrastructure, highlighting QGas's capability to support the preparation of consistent multi-carrier gas infrastructure datasets for energy system planning.

AI.tldr: 提出了QGAS交互式工具包，用于可视化、创建和协作扩展地理参考的燃气基础设施数据集，支持多载体能源系统规划。
AI.motivation: 燃气基础设施数据分散在异构来源中，现有工具创建拓扑一致网络表示复杂、耗时且易出错，需要统一工具支持脱碳能源规划。
AI.method: 开发基于Python、JavaScript和Leaflet地图库的模块化架构，集成GIS几何编辑与拓扑保持图操作，提供网络数字化、编辑、属性管理和拓扑一致修改功能。
AI.result: 实现统一Web环境工具包，通过天然气数据集扩展至氢气和CO2基础设施的示例，证明其能支持一致的多载体燃气基础设施数据集准备。
AI.conclusion: QGAS工具包能有效简化燃气基础设施数据集成与扩展过程，为能源系统规划提供一致的多载体网络表示支持。

title: Long-Term Memory for VLA-based Agents in Open-World Task Execution
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have demonstrated significant potential for embodied decision-making; however, their application in complex chemical laboratory automation remains restricted by limited long-horizon reasoning and the absence of persistent experience accumulation. Existing frameworks typically treat planning and execution as decoupled processes, often failing to consolidate successful strategies, which results in inefficient trial-and-error in multi-stage protocols. In this paper, we propose ChemBot, a dual-layer, closed-loop framework that integrates an autonomous AI agent with a progress-aware VLA model (Skill-VLA) for hierarchical task decomposition and execution. ChemBot utilizes a dual-layer memory architecture to consolidate successful trajectories into retrievable assets, while a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server facilitates efficient sub-agent and tool orchestration. To address the inherent limitations of VLA models, we further implement a future-state-based asynchronous inference mechanism to mitigate trajectory discontinuities. Extensive experiments on collaborative robots demonstrate that ChemBot achieves superior operational safety, precision, and task success rates compared to existing VLA baselines in complex, long-horizon chemical experimentation.

AI.tldr: 提出ChemBot框架，结合自主AI代理与进度感知VLA模型，通过双层记忆架构和异步推理机制提升化学实验室自动化中的长程决策能力。
AI.motivation: 现有VLA模型在复杂化学实验室自动化中受限于长程推理能力不足和缺乏经验积累，导致多阶段实验协议中效率低下。
AI.method: 1. 设计双层闭环框架整合AI代理与Skill-VLA模型；2. 采用双层记忆架构存储成功轨迹；3. 通过MCP服务器协调子代理与工具；4. 实现基于未来状态的异步推理机制。
AI.result: 在协作机器人实验中，ChemBot在操作安全性、精度和任务成功率上均优于现有VLA基线模型。
AI.conclusion: ChemBot通过经验积累与分层执行机制，显著提升了复杂化学实验自动化中的长程决策性能。

title: Fuzzy Logic Theory-based Adaptive Reward Shaping for Robust Reinforcement Learning (FARS)
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) often struggles in real-world tasks with high-dimensional state spaces and long horizons, where sparse or fixed rewards severely slow down exploration and cause agents to get trapped in local optima. This paper presents a fuzzy logic based reward shaping method that integrates human intuition into RL reward design. By encoding expert knowledge into adaptive and interpreable terms, fuzzy rules promote stable learning and reduce sensitivity to hyperparameters. The proposed method leverages these properties to adapt reward contributions based on the agent state, enabling smoother transitions between fast motion and precise control in challenging navigation tasks. Extensive simulation results on autonomous drone racing benchmarks show stable learning behavior and consistent task performance across scenarios of increasing difficulty. The proposed method achieves faster convergence and reduced performance variability across training seeds in more challenging environments, with success rates improving by up to approximately 5 percent compared to non fuzzy reward formulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的奖励塑形方法，将人类直觉融入强化学习奖励设计，在自主无人机竞速任务中实现了更稳定的学习和更快的收敛。
AI.motivation: 强化学习在高维状态空间和长时程任务中常因稀疏或固定奖励导致探索缓慢、陷入局部最优，需要更有效的奖励设计方法。
AI.method: 采用模糊逻辑奖励塑形方法，将专家知识编码为自适应且可解释的模糊规则，根据智能体状态动态调整奖励贡献。
AI.result: 在自主无人机竞速基准测试中，该方法表现出稳定的学习行为，在更具挑战性的环境中实现了更快的收敛和更低的性能方差，成功率比非模糊奖励方法提升约5%。
AI.conclusion: 模糊逻辑奖励塑形能有效整合人类直觉，促进强化学习在复杂导航任务中的稳定学习和性能提升，降低对超参数的敏感性。

title: Causal Bootstrapped Alignment for Unsupervised Video-Based Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification
summary: VVI-ReID is a critical technique for all-day surveillance, where temporal information provides additional cues beyond static images. However, existing approaches rely heavily on fully supervised learning with expensive cross-modality annotations, limiting scalability. To address this issue, we investigate Unsupervised Learning for VVI-ReID (USL-VVI-ReID), which learns identity-discriminative representations directly from unlabeled video tracklets. Directly extending image-based USL-VI-ReID methods to this setting with generic pretrained encoders leads to suboptimal performance. Such encoders suffer from weak identity discrimination and strong modality bias, resulting in severe intra-modality identity confusion and pronounced clustering granularity imbalance between visible and infrared modalities. These issues jointly degrade pseudo-label reliability and hinder effective cross-modality alignment. To address these challenges, we propose a Causal Bootstrapped Alignment (CBA) framework that explicitly exploits inherent video priors. First, we introduce Causal Intervention Warm-up (CIW), which performs sequence-level causal interventions by leveraging temporal identity consistency and cross-modality identity consistency to suppress modality- and motion-induced spurious correlations while preserving identity-relevant semantics, yielding cleaner representations for unsupervised clustering. Second, we propose Prototype-Guided Uncertainty Refinement (PGUR), which employs a coarse-to-fine alignment strategy to resolve cross-modality granularity mismatch, reorganizing under-clustered infrared representations under the guidance of reliable visible prototypes with uncertainty-aware supervision. Extensive experiments on the HITSZ-VCM and BUPTCampus benchmarks demonstrate that CBA significantly outperforms existing USL-VI-ReID methods when extended to the USL-VVI-ReID setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于无监督可见光-红外视频行人重识别（USL-VVI-ReID）的因果引导对齐框架（CBA），通过利用视频先验知识解决模态偏差和粒度不匹配问题，显著提升了性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的VVI-ReID方法严重依赖昂贵的跨模态标注数据，限制了可扩展性。而直接将基于图像的无监督方法扩展到视频领域时，由于预训练编码器存在身份判别能力弱和模态偏差强的问题，导致伪标签可靠性差和跨模态对齐困难。
AI.method: 提出了因果引导对齐（CBA）框架：1）因果干预预热（CIW），利用时序身份一致性和跨模态身份一致性进行序列级因果干预，抑制模态和运动引起的虚假关联；2）原型引导的不确定性细化（PGUR），采用由粗到细的对齐策略，在可靠可见光原型的指导下重组欠聚类的红外表示。
AI.result: 在HITSZ-VCM和BUPTCampus基准测试上的大量实验表明，CBA在扩展到USL-VVI-ReID设置时，显著优于现有的USL-VI-ReID方法。
AI.conclusion: CBA框架通过显式利用视频先验知识，有效解决了无监督跨模态视频行人重识别中的模态偏差和聚类粒度不平衡问题，为全天候监控提供了可扩展的解决方案。

title: SPLIT: Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography
summary: Machine learning has achieved impressive performance in tomographic reconstruction, but supervised training requires paired measurements and ground-truth images that are often unavailable. This has motivated self-supervised approaches, which have primarily addressed denoising and, more recently, linear inverse problems. We address nonlinear inverse problems and introduce SPLIT (Self-supervised Partitioning for Learned Inversion in Nonlinear Tomography), a self-supervised machine-learning framework for reconstructing images from nonlinear, incomplete, and noisy projection data without any samples of ground-truth images. SPLIT enforces cross-partition consistency and measurement-domain fidelity while exploiting complementary information across multiple partitions. Our main theoretical result shows that, under mild conditions, the proposed self-supervised objective is equivalent to its supervised counterpart in expectation. We regularize training with an automatic stopping rule that halts optimization when a no-reference image-quality surrogate saturates. As a concrete application, we derive SPLIT variants for multispectral computed tomography. Experiments on sparse-view acquisitions demonstrate high reconstruction quality and robustness to noise, surpassing classical iterative reconstruction and recent self-supervised baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出SPLIT框架，一种自监督学习方法，用于解决非线性、不完整且含噪声的层析成像重建问题，无需真实图像样本。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法需要配对的测量数据和真实图像，但这些数据通常难以获取，尤其是在非线性逆问题中。
AI.method: SPLIT框架通过强制跨分区一致性和测量域保真度，利用多个分区的互补信息；引入自动停止规则，当无参考图像质量指标饱和时停止优化。
AI.result: 在稀疏视图采集实验中，SPLIT展现出高质量重建和强噪声鲁棒性，优于经典迭代重建和近期自监督基线方法。
AI.conclusion: SPLIT为非线性层析成像提供了一种有效的自监督重建方案，理论证明其自监督目标在期望上等价于监督目标。

title: Dispersion-Domain Detection for Mobile Molecular Communication Under Multiplicative Geometry Uncertainty
summary: Mobile molecular communication (MC) links with counting receivers are sensitive to transmitter--receiver geometry especially when nodes are mobile. We study binary detection from within-symbol count observations with unknown finite-memory inter-symbol interference (ISI) and a block-constant multiplicative geometry gain. Under a mixed-Poisson view mobility and geometry uncertainty can randomize the latent received intensity and create extra-Poisson dispersion. We propose a profiled dispersion-domain statistic $T_k^{(Δ)}$ formed after profiling the deterministic mean shape. The statistic subtracts the intrinsic Poisson component and normalizes by the squared profiled mean to target threshold stability under the stated multiplicative-gain model. Activity gating makes conditional and gate-integrated false-alarm probabilities explicit. We characterize $T_k^{(Δ)}$ using a time-series central-limit-theorem (CLT)-motivated Gaussian working approximation with long-run-variance dependence correction yielding Gaussian-approximate receiver operating characteristic (ROC)/bit-error-rate (BER) formulas and separability design metrics. Simulations with symbol-dependent active-Brownian mobility and finite-memory ISI support the proposed mechanism show empirical threshold stability over the tested gain range and indicate usefulness when mean-domain differences are weak unreliable or intentionally suppressed.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了移动分子通信中具有计数接收器的二进制检测问题，提出了一种针对未知几何增益和符号间干扰的色散域统计方法，通过高斯近似实现稳定的阈值检测。
AI.motivation: 移动分子通信中，发射器与接收器的几何关系不确定性会随机化接收强度，导致超出泊松分布的色散，影响检测性能，需要一种对几何增益变化鲁棒的检测方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于轮廓化色散域的统计量T_k^(Δ)，通过减去固有泊松分量并以轮廓化均值的平方归一化，结合活动门控技术，使用时序中心极限定理的高斯近似进行性能分析。
AI.result: 仿真表明，该方法在测试增益范围内具有经验阈值稳定性，在均值域差异较弱、不可靠或故意抑制时仍有效，支持所提机制的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的色散域统计方法能够处理移动分子通信中的几何不确定性和符号间干扰，提供稳定的检测性能，适用于均值域信息不足的场景。

title: LLMs Corrupt Your Documents When You Delegate
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are poised to disrupt knowledge work, with the emergence of delegated work as a new interaction paradigm (e.g., vibe coding). Delegation requires trust - the expectation that the LLM will faithfully execute the task without introducing errors into documents. We introduce DELEGATE-52 to study the readiness of AI systems in delegated workflows. DELEGATE-52 simulates long delegated workflows that require in-depth document editing across 52 professional domains, such as coding, crystallography, and music notation. Our large-scale experiment with 19 LLMs reveals that current models degrade documents during delegation: even frontier models (Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude 4.6 Opus, GPT 5.4) corrupt an average of 25% of document content by the end of long workflows, with other models failing more severely. Additional experiments reveal that agentic tool use does not improve performance on DELEGATE-52, and that degradation severity is exacerbated by document size, length of interaction, or presence of distractor files. Our analysis shows that current LLMs are unreliable delegates: they introduce sparse but severe errors that silently corrupt documents, compounding over long interaction.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过DELEGATE-52基准测试评估大语言模型在委托工作流中的可靠性，发现当前模型在长期委托任务中会损坏文档内容，即使前沿模型也会平均损坏25%的内容，且代理工具使用无法改善此问题。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型在知识工作中的广泛应用，委托工作成为一种新兴交互范式（如氛围编程），但委托需要信任模型能忠实执行任务而不引入错误。当前缺乏对模型在长期委托工作流中可靠性的系统评估。
AI.method: 提出DELEGATE-52基准，模拟52个专业领域（如编程、晶体学、音乐记谱）中需要深度文档编辑的长期委托工作流。对19个大语言模型进行大规模实验，并额外测试了代理工具使用、文档大小、交互长度和干扰文件等因素的影响。
AI.result: 当前模型在委托过程中会损坏文档：前沿模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro、Claude 4.6 Opus、GPT 5.4）在长期工作流结束时平均损坏25%的文档内容，其他模型表现更差。代理工具使用未能提升性能，且文档大小、交互长度和干扰文件会加剧损坏程度。
AI.conclusion: 当前大语言模型是不可靠的委托代理：它们会引入稀疏但严重的错误，悄无声息地损坏文档，并在长期交互中不断累积。这揭示了现有模型在委托工作流中的根本局限性。

title: Structured Abductive-Deductive-Inductive Reasoning for LLMs via Algebraic Invariants
comment: 10 pages + 3 pages references. Accepted as a poster at the ICLR 2026 Workshop for LLM Reasoning
summary: Large language models exhibit systematic limitations in structured logical reasoning: they conflate hypothesis generation with verification, cannot distinguish conjecture from validated knowledge, and allow weak reasoning steps to propagate unchecked through inference chains. We present a symbolic reasoning scaffold that operationalizes Peirce's tripartite inference -- abduction, deduction, and induction -- as an explicit protocol for LLM-assisted reasoning. The framework enforces logical consistency through five algebraic invariants (the Gamma Quintet), the strongest of which -- the Weakest Link bound -- ensures that no conclusion in a reasoning chain can exceed the reliability of its least-supported premise. This principle, independently grounded as weakest link resolution in possibilistic logic and empirically validated for chain-of-thought reasoning, prevents logical inconsistencies from accumulating across multi-step inference. We verify all invariants through a property-based testing suite of 100 properties and 16 fuzz tests over 10^5+ generated cases, providing a verified reference implementation of the invariants suitable as a foundation for future reasoning benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 提出一种符号推理框架，通过皮尔士的三段推理（溯因、演绎、归纳）和五个代数不变量（Gamma五元组）来解决大语言模型在结构化逻辑推理中的系统性问题，确保推理链的逻辑一致性。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在结构化逻辑推理中存在系统缺陷：混淆假设生成与验证、无法区分猜想与已验证知识、允许弱推理步骤在推理链中传播。这些缺陷促使研究者设计一种能强制逻辑一致性的推理框架。
AI.method: 采用符号推理框架，将皮尔士的三段推理（溯因、演绎、归纳）操作化为明确的推理协议，并通过五个代数不变量（Gamma五元组）强制逻辑一致性，其中最强的不变量“最弱链接边界”确保推理链中结论的可靠性不超过其最弱前提的可靠性。
AI.result: 通过基于属性的测试套件（100个属性和16个模糊测试，覆盖10^5+生成案例）验证了所有不变量，提供了一个经过验证的参考实现，可作为未来推理基准的基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过明确的推理协议和代数不变量，有效解决了大语言模型在结构化逻辑推理中的一致性问题，为构建可靠的推理系统提供了理论基础和实现参考。

title: GroupDPO: Memory efficient Group-wise Direct Preference Optimization
summary: Preference optimization is widely used to align Large Language Models (LLMs) with preference feedback. However, most existing methods train on a single positive-negative pair per prompt, discarding additional supervision available in preference datasets that typically contain multiple candidate responses. Motivated by this limitation, recent work explores group-wise preference optimization, which jointly contrasts multiple responses for the same prompt, but its empirical behavior and scalability remain underexplored due to the memory overhead of group-coupled objectives. In this work, we introduce a memory-efficient group-wise preference optimization algorithm that preserves gradients while decoupling samples during backpropagation, substantially reducing peak memory usage, which enables scalable training with larger group sizes. Across both offline and online alignment settings, we show that leveraging multiple responses consistently outperforms single-pair training. Furthermore, incorporating a negative log-likelihood (NLL) term on positive responses is critical for both performance gains and training stability.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种内存高效的组级偏好优化算法，通过解耦样本减少内存开销，使大组训练成为可能，在离线和在线对齐中均优于单对训练。
AI.motivation: 现有偏好优化方法通常每个提示只使用一个正负对进行训练，忽略了偏好数据集中通常包含多个候选响应的额外监督信息。
AI.method: 提出内存高效的组级偏好优化算法，在反向传播过程中解耦样本以保留梯度，大幅降低峰值内存使用，并引入正响应的负对数似然项以提升性能和稳定性。
AI.result: 使用多个响应的组级训练在离线和在线对齐设置中均一致优于单对训练；正响应的负对数似然项对性能提升和训练稳定性至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 组级偏好优化能有效利用多响应监督信息，通过内存优化算法实现可扩展训练，结合负对数似然项可显著提升对齐效果和训练稳定性。

title: From Individual Consumers to Energy Communities: A Techno-economic Assessment of Swiss Local Electricity Communities
comment: 5 pages, three figures, 1 table, submitted to IEEE PES ISGT EUROPE 2026 conference
summary: As energy communities move from policy design to implementation in Switzerland, understanding their performance in practice has become increasingly important. A techno-economic assessment of a regulation-compliant LEC is presented under the new Swiss legal framework in this study. A reference case without local electricity exchange is compared to a LEC scenario with internal electricity sharing. Results show that LEC participation increases local renewable utilization, reduces grid exports, and delivers economic benefits to both consumers and prosumers. A sensitivity analysis further indicates that internal electricity pricing plays a critical role in shaping trade-offs between overall efficiency and fairness in benefit distribution. This exploratory study provides practical insights to support informed decision-making and the future development of LEC in Switzerland.

AI.tldr: 本研究评估了瑞士新法律框架下合规本地能源社区（LEC）的技术经济表现，发现LEC参与能提高本地可再生能源利用率、减少电网输出，并为消费者和产消者带来经济效益。
AI.motivation: 随着瑞士能源社区从政策设计转向实施阶段，了解其实际运行表现变得日益重要，需要为决策和未来发展提供实践依据。
AI.method: 采用技术经济评估方法，对比无本地电力交换的基准案例与内部电力共享的LEC场景，并进行敏感性分析，重点关注内部电价机制的影响。
AI.result: LEC参与显著提高了本地可再生能源利用率，减少了电网输出，并为所有参与者带来经济效益；敏感性分析表明内部电价是平衡整体效率与利益分配公平性的关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 这项探索性研究为瑞士LEC的知情决策和未来发展提供了实践见解，强调了内部电价机制在优化社区运行效果中的重要作用。

title: KWBench: Measuring Unprompted Problem Recognition in Knowledge Work
summary:
We introduce the first version of KWBench (Knowledge Work Bench), a benchmark for unprompted problem recognition in large language models: can an LLM identify a professional scenario before attempting to solve it. Existing frontier benchmarks have saturated, and most knowledge-work evaluations to date reduce to extraction or task completion against a specification. KWBench targets the step before that: recognizing the governing structure of the situation from raw inputs alone.
  The benchmark contains 223 tasks sourced from practitioners across acquisitions, contract negotiations, clinical pharmacy, organizational politics, fraud analysis, and incentive design. Each task encodes a formal game-theoretic pattern (principal-agent conflict, signaling, mechanism design failure, strategic omission, coalitional dynamics, strategic interdependence) and carries structured ground truth recording the expert reading of the situation and the anticipated failure modes. Models receive raw data and a task prompt with no indication of problem type. Scoring is a three-tier rubric gated by a mandatory conjunctive check. Mandatory criteria encode the predicted wrong paths.
  We evaluate 16 models. The best model passes on 27.9% of tasks. The top two models agree on only 31.7% of their passes. Among the top 8, 44 tasks are solved by exactly one model; routing across the top 8 covers 50.7% of the benchmark, nearly double the best single model. Conditional on passing, quality scores converge (approx 83% across models); unconditional scores do not. Same models articulate the relevant game-theoretic concept correctly when asked, then fail to apply it unprompted. We release KWBench to shift how frontier models are evaluated on knowledge work, scoring them on whether they recognize the right problem from the situation alone, not only on how well they execute once the problem has been framed for them.

AI.tldr: KWBench是一个评估大语言模型无提示问题识别能力的基准，包含223个专业场景任务，要求模型仅从原始数据中识别问题结构而非直接解决问题。
AI.motivation: 现有前沿基准已饱和，且多数知识工作评估简化为基于明确规范的提取或任务完成，缺乏对问题识别能力的评估。
AI.method: 构建包含6个专业领域任务的基准，每个任务编码博弈论模式并包含结构化真实标签。采用三层评分标准，包含强制性的错误路径预测检查。评估了16个模型。
AI.result: 最佳模型仅通过27.9%的任务；前两名模型仅在31.7%的通过任务上一致；前8名模型联合覆盖50.7%的任务；模型在被询问时能正确表述博弈论概念，但无提示时无法应用。
AI.conclusion: 模型在无提示问题识别能力上表现有限，需要改进对情境的理解能力。发布KWBench旨在推动前沿模型评估从任务执行转向问题识别。

title: From Seeing to Simulating: Generative High-Fidelity Simulation with Digital Cousins for Generalizable Robot Learning and Evaluation
summary: Learning robust robot policies in real-world environments requires diverse data augmentation, yet scaling real-world data collection is costly due to the need for acquiring physical assets and reconfiguring environments. Therefore, augmenting real-world scenes into simulation has become a practical augmentation for efficient learning and evaluation. We present a generative framework that establishes a generative real-to-sim mapping from real-world panoramas to high-fidelity simulation scenes, and further synthesize diverse cousin scenes via semantic and geometric editing. Combined with high-quality physics engines and realistic assets, the generated scenes support interactive manipulation tasks. Additionally, we incorporate multi-room stitching to construct consistent large-scale environments for long-horizon navigation across complex layouts. Experiments demonstrate a strong sim-to-real correlation validating our platform's fidelity, and show that extensively scaling up data generation leads to significantly better generalization to unseen scene and object variations, demonstrating the effectiveness of Digital Cousins for generalizable robot learning and evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出生成式框架，将真实全景图映射到高保真仿真场景，通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化场景，支持机器人交互任务和长视野导航，实验验证了仿真到真实的强相关性及数据扩展对泛化能力的提升。
AI.motivation: 真实世界机器人策略学习需要多样化数据增强，但物理数据收集成本高昂，因此将真实场景增强到仿真中成为高效学习和评估的实用方法。
AI.method: 建立生成式真实到仿真映射框架，从真实全景图生成高保真仿真场景，通过语义和几何编辑合成多样化“表亲场景”，结合高质量物理引擎和真实资产，并采用多房间拼接构建大规模一致环境。
AI.result: 实验显示仿真到真实具有强相关性，验证了平台保真度；大规模数据生成显著提升了对未见场景和物体变化的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: Digital Cousins框架能有效支持可泛化的机器人学习和评估，通过仿真数据扩展提升机器人策略的适应性和鲁棒性。

title: A Practical Guide to PID Controller Implementation
summary: How difficult can it be to implement a PID controller? The answer is twofold. Implementing the PID control law is simple and computationally inexpensive. However, this basic form will not work in practical applications. The primary reason for this is the various physical limitations of the actuator. Measurement noise, different implementations depending on the various structures (P, PI, PD or PID), bumpless transfer, and varying sampling time also result in problems rendering the basic form inoperable. PID implementation is therefore more difficult than meets the eye. This paper introduces a reference implementation of the PID controller which considers these practical issues. It includes pseudo-code, discussion of the implementation choices and simulation of carefully selected, important test cases.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了考虑实际应用问题的PID控制器参考实现，包括伪代码、实现选择讨论和重要测试案例的仿真。
AI.motivation: 虽然PID控制律本身简单且计算成本低，但在实际应用中由于执行器物理限制、测量噪声、不同结构实现、无扰切换和变采样时间等问题，基本形式无法正常工作，因此需要更实用的实现方案。
AI.method: 提出了一种考虑实际问题的PID控制器参考实现方法，包括提供伪代码、讨论实现选择，并通过精心选择的重要测试案例进行仿真验证。
AI.result: 开发了一个能够处理实际应用中常见问题的PID控制器实现方案，包括执行器限制、噪声抑制、不同控制结构实现等实际问题。
AI.conclusion: PID控制器的实际实现比表面看起来更困难，需要综合考虑各种实际问题，本文提供的参考实现为解决这些问题提供了实用方案。

title: Stein Variational Black-Box Combinatorial Optimization
summary: Combinatorial black-box optimization in high-dimensional settings demands a careful trade-off between exploiting promising regions of the search space and preserving sufficient exploration to identify multiple optima. Although Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithms (EDAs) provide a powerful model-based framework, they often concentrate on a single region of interest, which may result in premature convergence when facing complex or multimodal objective landscapes. In this work, we incorporate the Stein operator to introduce a repulsive mechanism among particles in the parameter space, thereby encouraging the population to disperse and jointly explore several modes of the fitness landscape. Empirical evaluations across diverse benchmark problems show that the proposed method achieves performance competitive with, and in several cases superior to, leading state-of-the-art approaches, particularly on large-scale instances. These findings highlight the potential of Stein variational gradient descent as a promising direction for addressing large, computationally expensive, discrete black-box optimization problems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合Stein算子的估计分布算法，通过参数空间中的排斥机制使种群分散探索多个最优区域，在高维组合黑盒优化中表现优异
AI.motivation: 传统估计分布算法在复杂多峰目标函数中容易过早收敛于单一区域，需要平衡探索与利用，特别是在高维离散黑盒优化问题中
AI.method: 将Stein算子引入估计分布算法，在参数空间中建立粒子间排斥机制，促进种群分散并同时探索适应度景观的多个模态
AI.result: 在多种基准问题上实证评估显示，该方法性能与现有先进方法相当或更优，尤其在大规模实例中表现突出
AI.conclusion: Stein变分梯度下降是解决大规模、计算昂贵的离散黑盒优化问题的有前景方向，能有效避免早熟收敛并提升多峰探索能力

title: Towards Realistic Open-Vocabulary Remote Sensing Segmentation: Benchmark and Baseline
summary: Open-vocabulary remote sensing image segmentation (OVRSIS) remains underexplored due to fragmented datasets, limited training diversity, and the lack of evaluation benchmarks that reflect realistic geospatial application demands. Our previous \textit{OVRSISBenchV1} established an initial cross-dataset evaluation protocol, but its limited scope is insufficient for assessing realistic open-world generalization. To address this issue, we propose \textit{OVRSISBenchV2}, a large-scale and application-oriented benchmark for OVRSIS. We first construct \textbf{OVRSIS95K}, a balanced dataset of about 95K image--mask pairs covering 35 common semantic categories across diverse remote sensing scenes. Built upon OVRSIS95K and 10 downstream datasets, OVRSISBenchV2 contains 170K images and 128 categories, substantially expanding scene diversity, semantic coverage, and evaluation difficulty. Beyond standard open-vocabulary segmentation, it further includes downstream protocols for building extraction, road extraction, and flood detection, thereby better reflecting realistic geospatial application demands and complex deployment scenarios. We also propose \textbf{Pi-Seg}, a baseline for OVRSIS. Pi-Seg improves transferability through a \textbf{positive-incentive noise} mechanism, where learnable and semantically guided perturbations broaden the visual-text feature space during training. Extensive experiments on OVRSISBenchV1, OVRSISBenchV2, and downstream tasks show that Pi-Seg delivers strong and consistent results, particularly on the more challenging OVRSISBenchV2 benchmark. Our results highlight both the importance of realistic benchmark design and the effectiveness of perturbation-based transfer for OVRSIS. The code and datasets are available at \href{https://github.com/LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}{LiBingyu01/RSKT-Seg/tree/Pi-Seg}.

AI.tldr: 提出OVRSISBenchV2基准和Pi-Seg基线方法，用于开放词汇遥感图像分割，通过大规模数据集和噪声增强机制提升模型泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有开放词汇遥感图像分割研究存在数据集碎片化、训练多样性不足、缺乏反映真实地理空间应用需求的评估基准等问题，需要更全面的基准和方法来评估现实世界的泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建包含95K图像-掩码对的OVRSIS95K数据集，整合形成170K图像的OVRSISBenchV2基准；提出Pi-Seg基线方法，采用正激励噪声机制，通过可学习的语义引导扰动扩展视觉-文本特征空间。
AI.result: Pi-Seg在OVRSISBenchV1、OVRSISBenchV2及下游任务上表现一致且强劲，尤其在更具挑战性的OVRSISBenchV2基准上效果显著，验证了基准设计的合理性和扰动迁移的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 现实基准设计对开放词汇遥感图像分割至关重要，基于扰动的迁移方法能有效提升模型泛化性能，为地理空间应用提供了更可靠的评估框架和解决方案。

title: Limits of Lamarckian Evolution Under Pressure of Morphological Novelty
summary: Lamarckian inheritance has been shown to be a powerful accelerator in systems where the joint evolution of robot morphologies and controllers is enhanced with individual learning. Its defining advantage lies in the offspring inheriting controllers learned by their parents. The efficacy of this option, however, relies on morphological similarity between parent and offspring. In this study, we examine how Lamarckian inheritance performs when the search process is driven toward high morphological variance, potentially straining the requirement for parent-offspring similarity. Using a system of modular robots that can evolve and learn to solve a locomotion task, we compare Darwinian and Lamarckian evolution to determine how they respond to shifting from pure task-based selection to a multi-objective pressure that also rewards morphological novelty. Our results confirm that Lamarckian evolution outperforms Darwinian evolution when optimizing task-performance alone. However, introducing selection pressure for morphological diversity causes a substantial performance drop, which is much greater in the Lamarckian system. Further analyses show that promoting diversity reduces parent-offspring similarity, which in turn reduces the benefits of inheriting controllers learned by parents. These results reveal the limits of Lamarckian evolution by exposing a fundamental trade-off between inheritance-based exploitation and diversity-driven exploration.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了在机器人形态和控制器协同进化中，拉马克遗传在追求形态多样性时的表现，发现其优势在形态差异增大时显著下降。
AI.motivation: 拉马克遗传能加速机器人形态和控制器的进化，但其效果依赖于亲子形态相似性；当进化过程强调形态多样性时，这种相似性可能被破坏，从而影响性能。
AI.method: 使用模块化机器人系统，在解决运动任务中比较达尔文和拉马克进化；从单纯任务性能优化转向多目标选择（同时奖励形态新颖性），分析性能变化和亲子相似性。
AI.result: 仅优化任务性能时，拉马克进化优于达尔文进化；但引入形态多样性压力后，拉马克系统性能大幅下降，且降幅更大，因为多样性降低了亲子相似性，削弱了继承学习控制器的益处。
AI.conclusion: 拉马克进化存在局限性，揭示了基于遗传的利用和多样性驱动的探索之间的根本权衡，形态多样性会损害其优势。

title: From Zero to Detail: A Progressive Spectral Decoupling Paradigm for UHD Image Restoration with New Benchmark
summary: Ultra-high-definition (UHD) image restoration poses unique challenges due to the high spatial resolution, diverse content, and fine-grained structures present in UHD images. To address these issues, we introduce a progressive spectral decomposition for the restoration process, decomposing it into three stages: zero-frequency \textbf{enhancement}, low-frequency \textbf{restoration}, and high-frequency \textbf{refinement}. Based on this formulation, we propose a novel framework, \textbf{ERR}, which integrates three cooperative sub-networks: the zero-frequency enhancer (ZFE), the low-frequency restorer (LFR), and the high-frequency refiner (HFR). The ZFE incorporates global priors to learn holistic mappings, the LFR reconstructs the main content by focusing on coarse-scale information, and the HFR adopts our proposed frequency-windowed Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (FW-KAN) to recover fine textures and intricate details for high-fidelity restoration. To further advance research in UHD image restoration, we also construct a large-scale, high-quality benchmark dataset, \textbf{LSUHDIR}, comprising 82{,}126 UHD images with diverse scenes and rich content. Our proposed methods demonstrate superior performance across a range of UHD image restoration tasks, and extensive ablation studies confirm the contribution and necessity of each module. Project page: https://github.com/NJU-PCALab/ERR.

AI.tldr: 提出ERR框架，通过渐进式频谱分解（零频增强、低频恢复、高频细化）和FW-KAN网络，结合新建的LSUHDIR数据集，实现超高清图像高质量恢复。
AI.motivation: 超高清图像恢复面临高分辨率、内容多样和结构精细的独特挑战，现有方法难以同时处理全局信息和细节纹理。
AI.method: 1. 渐进式频谱分解三阶段框架（ERR）；2. 三个协作子网络：ZFE（全局先验）、LFR（粗尺度重建）、HFR（FW-KAN细化细节）；3. 构建LSUHDIR数据集（82,126张UHD图像）。
AI.result: 在多种UHD图像恢复任务中表现优异，消融实验验证了各模块的必要性和贡献。
AI.conclusion: ERR框架通过频谱分解和专用子网络有效解决了UHD图像恢复的挑战，新建数据集推动了该领域研究。

title: FD-NL2SQL: Feedback-Driven Clinical NL2SQL that Improves with Use
summary: Clinicians exploring oncology trial repositories often need ad-hoc, multi-constraint queries over biomarkers, endpoints, interventions, and time, yet writing SQL requires schema expertise. We demo FD-NL2SQL, a feedback-driven clinical NL2SQL assistant for SQLite-based oncology databases. Given a natural-language question, a schema-aware LLM decomposes it into predicate-level sub-questions, retrieves semantically similar expert-verified NL2SQL exemplars via sentence embeddings, and synthesizes executable SQL conditioned on the decomposition, retrieved exemplars, and schema, with post-processing validity checks. To improve with use, FD-NL2SQL incorporates two update signals: (i) clinician edits of generated SQL are approved and added to the exemplar bank; and (ii) lightweight logic-based SQL augmentation applies a single atomic mutation (e.g., operator or column change), retaining variants only if they return non-empty results. A second LLM generates the corresponding natural-language question and predicate decomposition for accepted variants, automatically expanding the exemplar bank without additional annotation. The demo interface exposes decomposition, retrieval, synthesis, and execution results to support interactive refinement and continuous improvement.

AI.tldr: 介绍FD-NL2SQL系统，这是一个基于反馈驱动的临床自然语言转SQL助手，专为肿瘤学数据库设计，通过分解问题、检索示例和合成SQL来支持临床医生进行复杂查询。
AI.motivation: 临床医生在探索肿瘤学试验数据库时，经常需要进行多约束的临时查询，但编写SQL需要专业知识，因此需要一个易于使用的自然语言转SQL工具来降低使用门槛。
AI.method: 系统使用模式感知的LLM将自然语言问题分解为谓词级子问题，通过句子嵌入检索专家验证的NL2SQL示例，并基于分解、检索结果和模式合成可执行的SQL，同时包含后处理有效性检查。系统通过两种更新信号持续改进：临床医生编辑并批准的SQL被添加到示例库，以及基于逻辑的SQL增强生成变体并自动扩展示例库。
AI.result: FD-NL2SQL提供了一个演示界面，展示分解、检索、合成和执行结果，支持交互式细化和持续改进，使临床医生能够更轻松地进行复杂查询。
AI.conclusion: FD-NL2SQL通过反馈驱动的方法，有效降低了临床医生使用肿瘤学数据库的SQL查询门槛，并通过自动扩展示例库实现了系统的持续优化。

title: Imperfectly Cooperative Human-AI Interactions: Comparing the Impacts of Human and AI Attributes in Simulated and User Studies
comment: Will be presented at ACL 2026 and published in the Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: AI design characteristics and human personality traits each impact the quality and outcomes of human-AI interactions. However, their relative and joint impacts are underexplored in imperfectly cooperative scenarios, where people and AI only have partially aligned goals and objectives. This study compares a purely simulated dataset comprising 2,000 simulations and a parallel human subjects experiment involving 290 human participants to investigate these effects across two scenario categories: (1) hiring negotiations between human job candidates and AI hiring agents; and (2) human-AI transactions wherein AI agents may conceal information to maximize internal goals. We examine user Extraversion and Agreeableness alongside AI design characteristics, including Adaptability, Expertise, and chain-of-thought Transparency. Our causal discovery analysis extends performance-focused evaluations by integrating scenario-based outcomes, communication analysis, and questionnaire measures. Results reveal divergences between purely simulated and human study datasets, and between scenario types. In simulation experiments, personality traits and AI attributes were comparatively influential. Yet, with actual human subjects, AI attributes -- particularly transparency -- were much more impactful. We discuss how these divergences vary across different interaction contexts, offering crucial insights for the future of human-centered AI agents.

AI.tldr: 本研究通过模拟实验和真人实验，比较了人类人格特质与AI设计特性在目标不完全一致的人机协作场景中的相对及联合影响，发现模拟与真人实验结果存在差异，且AI透明度在真人互动中影响更大。
AI.motivation: 人类人格特质与AI设计特性均影响人机交互质量，但二者在不完全合作场景（双方目标仅部分一致）中的相对与共同作用尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 采用并行研究设计：1）基于2000次仿真的纯模拟数据集；2）涉及290名真人参与者的实验。场景包括招聘谈判和AI可能隐瞒信息以达成内部目标的交易任务。分析结合了用户外向性/宜人性人格特质、AI适应性/专业性/思维链透明度等设计特性，并通过因果发现方法整合场景结果、沟通分析和问卷测量。
AI.result: 模拟实验与真人实验结果存在分歧：模拟中人格特质与AI属性影响相当；但在真人实验中，AI属性（尤其是透明度）的影响远大于人格特质。这种差异在不同互动情境（招聘谈判 vs. 信息不对称交易）中也有所变化。
AI.conclusion: 模拟环境与真人互动中影响因素的权重存在显著差异，突显了在开发以人为本的AI代理时，需结合真实人类行为数据评估设计特性，并考虑不同交互情境的调节作用。

title: Uncertainty-based perturb and observe for data-driven optimization
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures. This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
summary: Data-based adaptive optimization methods hold great promise for the performance optimization of uncertain, time-varying processes. However, current methods are often based on continuous perturbation which is in general undesired for real-life (e.g., industrial) applications. In this paper, a new uncertainty-based perturb-and-observe method is developed that addresses this limitation and reduces the required number of perturbations, while retaining the capability to track time-varying optima. The method is based on the philosophy of `only perturbing when needed,' and is shown to converge to the optimum under mild conditions. A simulation-based case study on a photo-voltaic solar array demonstrates that it can outperform the standard perturb and observe approach as well as three other data-based optimization methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于不确定性的扰动观测方法，减少扰动次数同时保持跟踪时变最优解的能力，在光伏阵列案例中表现优于传统方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于数据的自适应优化方法通常依赖持续扰动，这在工业等实际应用中不受欢迎，需要减少扰动频率同时保持优化性能。
AI.method: 开发了'仅在需要时扰动'的不确定性扰动观测方法，通过判断是否需要扰动来减少操作次数，并在温和条件下证明其收敛性。
AI.result: 方法在光伏太阳能阵列的仿真案例研究中，表现优于标准扰动观测方法及其他三种基于数据的优化方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了持续扰动问题，减少了实际应用中的扰动需求，同时保持了跟踪时变最优解的能力，具有实际应用价值。

title: Environment-Adaptive Solid-State LiDAR-Inertial Odometry
summary: Solid-state LiDAR-inertial SLAM has attracted significant attention due to its advantages in speed and robustness. However, achieving accurate mapping in extreme environments remains challenging due to severe geometric degeneracy and unreliable observations, which often lead to ill-conditioned optimization and map inconsistencies. To address these challenges, we propose an environment-adaptive solid-state LiDAR-inertial odometry that integrates local normal-vector constraints with degeneracy-aware map maintenance to enhance localization accuracy. Specifically, we introduce local normal-vector constraints to improve the stability of state estimation, effectively suppressing localization drift in degenerate scenarios. Furthermore, we design a degeneration-guided map update strategy to improve map precision. Benefiting from the refined map representation, localization accuracy is further enhanced in subsequent estimation. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior mapping accuracy and robustness in extreme and perceptually degraded environments, with an average RMSE reduction of up to 12.8% compared to the baseline method.

AI.tldr: 提出一种环境自适应固态激光雷达-惯性里程计方法，通过局部法向量约束和退化感知地图维护，提升极端环境下的SLAM精度与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM在极端环境中面临严重几何退化和不可靠观测问题，导致优化病态和地图不一致，需要提高其在这些场景下的准确性和稳定性。
AI.method: 1. 引入局部法向量约束以增强状态估计稳定性；2. 设计退化感知的地图更新策略，通过退化指导地图维护提升地图精度。
AI.result: 在极端和感知退化环境中，该方法相比基线方法平均RMSE降低达12.8%，实现了更优的建图精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的环境自适应方法通过融合局部几何约束与智能地图维护，有效解决了固态激光雷达-惯性SLAM在退化环境中的挑战，显著提升了系统性能。

title: Discover and Prove: An Open-source Agentic Framework for Hard Mode Automated Theorem Proving in Lean 4
summary: Most ATP benchmarks embed the final answer within the formal statement -- a convention we call "Easy Mode" -- a design that simplifies the task relative to what human competitors face and may lead to optimistic estimates of model capability. We call the stricter, more realistic setting "Hard Mode": the system must independently discover the answer before constructing a formal proof. To enable Hard Mode research, we make two contributions. First, we release MiniF2F-Hard and FIMO-Hard, expert-reannotated Hard Mode variants of two widely-used ATP benchmarks. Second, we introduce Discover And Prove (DAP), an agentic framework that uses LLM natural-language reasoning with explicit self-reflection to discover answers, then rewrites Hard Mode statements into Easy Mode ones for existing ATP provers. DAP sets the state of the art: on CombiBench it raises solved problems from 7 (previous SOTA, Pass@16) to 10; on PutnamBench it is the first system to formally prove 36 theorems in Hard Mode -- while simultaneously revealing that state-of-the-art LLMs exceed 80% answer accuracy on the same problems where formal provers manage under 10%, exposing a substantial gap that Hard Mode benchmarks are uniquely suited to measure.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了自动定理证明中的'困难模式'概念，并开发了DAP框架，在多个基准测试中取得最佳性能，揭示了LLMs与形式证明器之间的能力差距。
AI.motivation: 现有ATP基准测试通常将答案嵌入形式化陈述中（'简单模式'），这种设计简化了任务，可能导致对模型能力的高估。需要更严格、更接近人类竞赛环境的'困难模式'来评估系统真实能力。
AI.method: 1) 发布MiniF2F-Hard和FIMO-Hard两个专家重新标注的困难模式基准；2) 提出DAP框架：使用LLM进行自然语言推理和自我反思来发现答案，然后将困难模式陈述重写为简单模式供现有ATP证明器使用。
AI.result: DAP在CombiBench上将已解决问题从7个提升到10个；在PutnamBench上首次在困难模式下形式化证明了36个定理；同时发现最先进LLMs在相同问题上的答案准确率超过80%，而形式证明器成功率低于10%。
AI.conclusion: 困难模式基准能更真实地评估系统能力，DAP框架在困难模式下取得最佳性能，揭示了LLMs与形式证明器之间存在的显著能力差距，为未来研究提供了重要方向。

title: CPU Optimization of a Monocular 3D Biomechanics Pipeline for Low-Resource Deployment
summary: Markerless 3D movement analysis from monocular video enables accessible biomechanical assessment in clinical and sports settings. However, most research-grade pipelines rely on GPU acceleration, limiting deployment on consumer-grade hardware and in low-resource environments. In this work, we optimize a monocular 3D biomechanics pipeline derived from the MonocularBiomechanics framework for efficient CPU-only execution. Through profiling-driven system optimization, including model initialization restructuring, elimination of disk I/O serialization, and improved CPU parallelization. Experiments on a consumer workstation (AMD Ryzen 7 9700X CPU) show a 2.47x increase in processing throughput and a 59.6\% reduction in total runtime, with initialization latency reduced by 4.6x. Despite these changes, biomechanical outputs remain highly consistent with the baseline implementation (mean joint-angle deviation 0.35$^\circ$, $r=0.998$). These results demonstrate that research-grade vision-based biomechanics pipelines can be deployed on commodity CPU hardware for scalable movement assessment.

AI.tldr: 优化单目视频3D生物力学分析流程，使其能在CPU上高效运行，提升在消费级硬件上的部署能力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究级3D生物力学分析流程依赖GPU加速，限制了在消费级硬件和低资源环境中的部署。
AI.method: 基于MonocularBiomechanics框架，通过模型初始化重构、消除磁盘I/O序列化和改进CPU并行化等系统优化方法。
AI.result: 在AMD Ryzen 7 9700X CPU上，处理吞吐量提升2.47倍，总运行时间减少59.6%，初始化延迟降低4.6倍，生物力学输出与基准实现高度一致。
AI.conclusion: 研究级视觉生物力学流程可在商品CPU硬件上部署，实现可扩展的运动评估。

title: CIG: Measuring Conversational Information Gain in Deliberative Dialogues with Semantic Memory Dynamics
summary: Measuring the quality of public deliberation requires evaluating not only civility or argument structure, but also the informational progress of a conversation. We introduce a framework for Conversational Information Gain (CIG) that evaluates each utterance in terms of how it advances collective understanding of the target topic. To operationalize CIG, we model an evolving semantic memory of the discussion: the system extracts atomic claims from utterances and incrementally consolidates them into a structured memory state. Using this memory, we score each utterance along three interpretable dimensions: Novelty, Relevance, and Implication Scope. We annotate 80 segments from two moderated deliberative settings (TV debates and community discussions) with these dimensions and show that memory-derived dynamics (e.g., the number of claim updates) correlate more strongly with human-perceived CIG than traditional heuristics such as utterance length or TF--IDF. We develop effective LLM-based CIG predictors paving the way for information-focused conversation quality analysis in dialogues and deliberative success.

AI.tldr: 提出对话信息增益框架，通过建模语义记忆评估对话质量，关注信息进展而非仅礼貌或结构。
AI.motivation: 现有公共讨论质量评估多关注礼貌性或论证结构，缺乏对信息进展的量化评估，需要新框架衡量对话如何促进集体理解。
AI.method: 构建对话语义记忆模型：从话语提取原子主张并整合为结构化记忆状态，基于记忆从新颖性、相关性和隐含范围三个维度评分话语。在电视辩论和社区讨论数据上标注验证。
AI.result: 记忆衍生的动态指标（如主张更新数量）比传统启发式方法（话语长度或TF-IDF）更显著相关于人类感知的信息增益；开发了有效的基于大语言模型的预测器。
AI.conclusion: 对话信息增益框架能有效评估对话信息质量，为聚焦信息进展的对话分析提供了新途径，有助于评估审议式对话的成功程度。

title: Robust predictive control design for uncertain discrete switched affine systems subject to an input delay
comment: Submitted to Nonlinear Analysis: Hybrid Systems
summary: Robust stabilization conditions for uncertain switched affine systems subject to a unitary input delay are presented. They are obtained through the Lyapunov framework and a min-switching state-feedback predictive control law. The result relies on a prediction scheme considering nominal system parameters. By constructing a Lyapunov function that considers the prediction error, we demonstrate the exponential convergence of the system trajectories and system prediction to a robust limit cycle. An example is provided to validate the obtained result.

AI.tldr: 本文针对具有单位输入延迟的不确定切换仿射系统，提出了鲁棒稳定条件，通过李雅普诺夫框架和最小切换状态反馈预测控制律实现，并证明了系统轨迹和预测的指数收敛性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机源于需要处理具有输入延迟和参数不确定性的切换仿射系统的稳定控制问题，这类系统在实际工程中常见但控制设计复杂。
AI.method: 采用李雅普诺夫框架和最小切换状态反馈预测控制律，结合考虑名义系统参数的预测方案，并构建了包含预测误差的李雅普诺夫函数。
AI.result: 证明了系统轨迹和系统预测能够指数收敛到一个鲁棒极限环，并通过示例验证了所提方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法能够有效稳定具有输入延迟和参数不确定性的切换仿射系统，为这类系统的控制提供了理论保证和实用方案。

title: DTEA: A Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator Enabling Real-Time Switching Between Series and Parallel Compliance
summary: Series and parallel elastic actuators offer complementary but mutually exclusive advantages, yet no existing actuator enables real-time transition between these topologies during operation. This paper presents a novel actuator design called the Dual-Topology Elastic Actuator (DTEA), which enables dynamic switching between SEA and PEA topologies during operation. A proof-of-concept prototype of the DTEA is developed to demonstrate the feasibility of the topology-switching mechanism. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the robustness and timing of the switching mechanism under operational conditions. The actuator successfully performed 324 topology-switching cycles under load without damage, demonstrating the robustness of the mechanism. The measured switching time between SEA and PEA modes is under 33.33 ms. Additional experiments are conducted to characterize the static stiffness and disturbance rejection performance in both SEA and PEA modes. Static stiffness tests show that the PEA mode is 1.53x stiffer than the SEA mode, with KSEA = 5.57 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad and KPEA = 8.54 +/- 0.02 Nm/rad. Disturbance rejection experiments show that the mean peak deflection in SEA mode is 2.26x larger than in PEA mode (5.2 deg vs. 2.3 deg), while the mean settling time is 3.45x longer (1380 ms vs. 400 ms). The observed behaviors are consistent with the known characteristics of conventional SEA and PEA actuators, validating the functionality of both modes in the DTEA actuator.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新型双拓扑弹性驱动器（DTEA），能够在运行中实时切换串联弹性执行器（SEA）和并联弹性执行器（PEA）两种拓扑结构，并通过原型验证了其可行性和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有串联和并联弹性执行器各有优势但无法在运行中切换拓扑结构，限制了执行器的适应性和性能优化。
AI.method: 设计了DTEA原型机，通过实验评估拓扑切换机制的鲁棒性、切换时间、静态刚度以及抗干扰性能。
AI.result: DTEA在负载下完成324次拓扑切换无损坏，切换时间小于33.33毫秒；PEA模式刚度是SEA的1.53倍，抗干扰时峰值偏转小2.26倍，稳定时间快3.45倍。
AI.conclusion: DTEA成功实现了运行中拓扑切换，兼具SEA和PEA的优势，为弹性执行器设计提供了新思路。

title: Towards Rigorous Explainability by Feature Attribution
summary: For around a decade, non-symbolic methods have been the option of choice when explaining complex machine learning (ML) models. Unfortunately, such methods lack rigor and can mislead human decision-makers. In high-stakes uses of ML, the lack of rigor is especially problematic. One prime example of provable lack of rigor is the adoption of Shapley values in explainable artificial intelligence (XAI), with the tool SHAP being a ubiquitous example. This paper overviews the ongoing efforts towards using rigorous symbolic methods of XAI as an alternative to non-rigorous non-symbolic approaches, concretely for assigning relative feature importance.

AI.tldr: 本文主张用严格的符号化方法替代非符号化方法进行机器学习模型解释，特别针对特征重要性分配问题，批评了当前流行的SHAP等非严格方法在高风险应用中的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释人工智能（XAI）领域广泛采用的非符号化方法（如SHAP）缺乏严谨性，可能误导人类决策者，这在机器学习的高风险应用中尤其成问题。
AI.method: 本文综述了使用严格符号化方法进行XAI的研究进展，重点关注特征重要性分配的符号化方法替代方案。
AI.result: 论文指出非符号化方法存在可证明的严谨性缺失问题，并展示了符号化方法作为替代方案的发展现状。
AI.conclusion: 在高风险机器学习应用中，应采用严谨的符号化解释方法替代当前流行的非严格非符号化方法，以确保解释的可靠性和决策的安全性。

title: PixDLM: A Dual-Path Multimodal Language Model for UAV Reasoning Segmentation
summary: Reasoning segmentation has recently expanded from ground-level scenes to remote-sensing imagery, yet UAV data poses distinct challenges, including oblique viewpoints, ultra-high resolutions, and extreme scale variations. To address these issues, we formally define the UAV Reasoning Segmentation task and organize its semantic requirements into three dimensions: Spatial, Attribute, and Scene-level reasoning. Based on this formulation, we construct DRSeg, a large-scale benchmark for UAV reasoning segmentation, containing 10k high-resolution aerial images paired with Chain-of-Thought QA supervision across all three reasoning types. As a benchmark companion, we introduce PixDLM, a simple yet effective pixel-level multimodal language model that serves as a unified baseline for this task. Experiments on DRSeg establish strong baseline results and highlight the unique challenges of UAV reasoning segmentation, providing a solid foundation for future research.

AI.tldr: 本文针对无人机影像的推理分割任务，提出了三维语义需求框架，构建了大规模基准数据集DRSeg，并开发了像素级多模态语言模型PixDLM作为统一基线。
AI.motivation: 现有推理分割研究主要针对地面场景，而无人机影像存在倾斜视角、超高分辨率和极端尺度变化等独特挑战，需要专门的研究框架和基准。
AI.method: 1) 将无人机推理分割的语义需求划分为空间、属性和场景三个维度；2) 构建包含1万张高分辨率航拍图像的DRSeg基准数据集，配备链式思维问答监督；3) 提出PixDLM像素级多模态语言模型作为统一基线方法。
AI.result: 在DRSeg数据集上的实验建立了强基线结果，验证了PixDLM的有效性，同时凸显了无人机推理分割任务的独特挑战。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为无人机推理分割提供了系统的任务定义、大规模基准数据集和有效的基线模型，为未来研究奠定了坚实基础。

title: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
summary: As LLM agents scale to long-horizon, multi-session deployments, efficiently managing accumulated experience becomes a critical bottleneck. Agent memory systems and agent skill discovery both address this challenge -- extracting reusable knowledge from interaction traces -- yet a citation analysis of 1,136 references across 22 primary papers reveals a cross-community citation rate below 1%. We propose the \emph{Experience Compression Spectrum}, a unifying framework that positions memory, skills, and rules as points along a single axis of increasing compression (5--20$\times$ for episodic memory, 50--500$\times$ for procedural skills, 1,000$\times$+ for declarative rules), directly reducing context consumption, retrieval latency, and compute overhead. Mapping 20+ systems onto this spectrum reveals that every system operates at a fixed, predetermined compression level -- none supports adaptive cross-level compression, a gap we term the \emph{missing diagonal}. We further show that specialization alone is insufficient -- both communities independently solve shared sub-problems without exchanging solutions -- that evaluation methods are tightly coupled to compression levels, that transferability increases with compression at the cost of specificity, and that knowledge lifecycle management remains largely neglected. We articulate open problems and design principles for scalable, full-spectrum agent learning systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了经验压缩谱框架，统一了记忆、技能和规则三种知识表示形式，揭示了当前系统缺乏跨压缩级别自适应能力的局限性，并指出了构建可扩展智能体学习系统的设计原则。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM智能体向长时程、多会话部署扩展，如何高效管理累积经验成为关键瓶颈。智能体记忆系统和技能发现领域都致力于从交互轨迹中提取可重用知识，但两个社区之间引用率极低（<1%），缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 提出经验压缩谱框架，将记忆、技能和规则定位为单一压缩轴上的不同点（压缩比：情景记忆5-20倍，程序技能50-500倍，声明性规则1000倍以上）；对22篇主要论文的1136篇参考文献进行引文分析；将20多个系统映射到该谱系上进行分析。
AI.result: 发现所有系统都在固定的预定压缩级别上运行，缺乏自适应跨级别压缩能力（称为“缺失对角线”）；两个社区独立解决共享子问题而未交换解决方案；评估方法与压缩级别紧密耦合；可迁移性随压缩增加而提高，但以特异性为代价；知识生命周期管理仍被忽视。
AI.conclusion: 当前智能体学习系统存在跨压缩级别自适应能力的缺失，需要开发支持全谱系学习的系统。文章阐明了可扩展智能体学习系统的开放问题和设计原则，强调需要统一框架来整合记忆、技能和规则表示。

title: HyperGVL: Benchmarking and Improving Large Vision-Language Models in Hypergraph Understanding and Reasoning
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) consistently require new arenas to guide their expanding boundaries, yet their capabilities with hypergraphs remain unexplored. In the real world, hypergraphs have significant practical applications in areas such as life sciences and social communities. Recent advancements in LVLMs have shown promise in understanding complex topologies, yet there remains a lack of a benchmark to delineate the capabilities of LVLMs with hypergraphs, leaving the boundaries of their abilities unclear. To fill this gap, in this paper, we introduce $\texttt{HyperGVL}$, the first benchmark to evaluate the proficiency of LVLMs in hypergraph understanding and reasoning. $\texttt{HyperGVL}$ provides a comprehensive assessment of 12 advanced LVLMs across 84,000 vision-language question-answering (QA) samples spanning 12 tasks, ranging from basic component counting to complex NP-hard problem reasoning. The involved hypergraphs contain multiscale synthetic structures and real-world citation and protein networks. Moreover, we examine the effects of 12 textual and visual hypergraph representations and introduce a generalizable router $\texttt{WiseHyGR}$ that improves LVLMs in hypergraph via learning adaptive representations. We believe that this work is a step forward in connecting hypergraphs with LVLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个评估大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在超图理解和推理能力的基准测试HyperGVL，包含12个任务共84,000个视觉语言问答样本，并提出了自适应表示学习框架WiseHyGR以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 超图在生命科学、社交网络等领域有重要应用，但现有研究缺乏评估LVLMs处理超图能力的基准，导致其能力边界不清晰。
AI.method: 构建HyperGVL基准测试，涵盖多尺度合成结构及真实引用网络、蛋白质网络；设计12种文本与视觉超图表示方法；提出可泛化的路由框架WiseHyGR，通过学习自适应表示增强LVLMs的超图处理能力。
AI.result: 对12个先进LVLMs进行全面评估，发现其在超图任务（从基础组件计数到NP难问题推理）中表现存在显著差异；WiseHyGR能有效提升模型在超图任务上的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了LVLMs超图能力评估的空白，推动了超图与LVLMs的结合，为后续研究提供了基准与优化方向。

title: Stealthy Cyber-Attacks on Vehicle Lateral Dynamics: A System-Theoretic Analysis
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles. \c{opyright} 2026 IEEE. Permission from IEEE must be obtained for all other uses
summary: This paper studies the vehicle bicycle model under three classes of stealthy cyber-attacks: replay attacks, zero dynamics attacks, and covert attacks. Using a system-theoretic framework, we analyze the feasibility and impact of these attacks on vehicle lateral dynamics. The investigation considers different measurement configurations, including yaw rate, lateral acceleration, and longitudinal acceleration outputs, to evaluate how sensor selection influences attack detectability and system vulnerability. Each attack class is characterized in terms of required system knowledge, communication access, and impact. The analysis shows that replay attacks remain largely model-agnostic, while zero dynamics attacks are fundamentally constrained by control-oriented design choices, particularly output selection, which can eliminate unstable zero dynamics and limit the attack impact. In contrast, covert attacks, enabled by coordinated actuator and sensor manipulation, allow sustained and stealthy deviation of lateral states when sufficient access and system knowledge are available. The effects of actuator and tire saturation are also examined, revealing attack-dependent impacts on stealthiness and effectiveness. Finally, simulation case studies are conducted by using CarSim-Simulink co-simulation to validate and verify the theoretical results.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了车辆自行车模型在三种隐蔽网络攻击下的脆弱性：重放攻击、零动态攻击和隐蔽攻击，分析了不同传感器配置对攻击可检测性和系统安全性的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着车辆系统日益网络化，隐蔽网络攻击对车辆横向动力学的威胁日益凸显，需要系统性地分析不同攻击类型在车辆控制中的可行性和影响。
AI.method: 采用系统理论框架分析攻击特性，考虑横摆角速度、横向加速度和纵向加速度等不同测量配置，并通过CarSim-Simulink联合仿真验证理论结果。
AI.result: 重放攻击基本与模型无关；零动态攻击受输出选择等控制设计约束；隐蔽攻击在具备足够系统知识和访问权限时可实现持续隐蔽的横向状态偏离。执行器和轮胎饱和对攻击隐蔽性和有效性有不同影响。
AI.conclusion: 传感器配置选择可显著影响系统对特定攻击的脆弱性，控制导向的设计（如输出选择）能消除不稳定零动态，从而限制零动态攻击的影响，但隐蔽攻击在充分条件下仍构成严重威胁。

title: HyCal: A Training-Free Prototype Calibration Method for Cross-Discipline Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Eunju Lee and MiHyeon Kim contributed equally as co-first authors
summary: Pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) like CLIP show promise in continual learning, but existing Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (FSCIL) methods assume homogeneous domains and balanced data distributions, limiting real-world applicability where data arises from heterogeneous disciplines with imbalanced sample availability and varying visual complexity. We identify Domain Gravity, a representational asymmetry where data imbalance across heterogeneous domains causes overrepresented or low-entropy domains to disproportionately influence the embedding space, leading to prototype drift and degraded performance on underrepresented or high-entropy domains. To address this, we introduce Cross-Discipline Variable Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning (XD-VSCIL), a benchmark capturing real-world heterogeneity and imbalance where Domain Gravity naturally intensifies. We propose Hybrid Prototype Calibration (HyCal), a training-free method combining cosine similarity and Mahalanobis distance to capture complementary geometric properties-directional alignment and covariance-aware magnitude-yielding stable prototypes under imbalanced heterogeneous conditions. Operating on frozen CLIP embeddings, HyCal achieves consistent retention-adaptation improvements while maintaining efficiency. Experiments show HyCal effectively mitigates Domain Gravity and outperforms existing methods in imbalanced cross-domain incremental learning.

AI.tldr: 提出XD-VSCIL基准和HyCal方法，解决异构域不平衡数据下的少样本类增量学习问题，通过结合余弦相似度和马氏距离稳定原型表示，缓解领域引力效应。
AI.motivation: 现有FSCIL方法假设同质域和平衡数据分布，但现实场景中数据来自异构学科，存在样本不平衡和视觉复杂度差异，导致领域引力效应——数据不平衡引发嵌入空间表示偏差，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 提出训练无关的混合原型校准方法HyCal，结合余弦相似度（捕捉方向对齐）和马氏距离（协方差感知幅度），在冻结CLIP嵌入上操作，生成异构不平衡条件下的稳定原型。
AI.result: HyCal在跨域不平衡增量学习中有效缓解领域引力效应，在保持效率的同时实现持续的性能提升，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: HyCal通过几何互补的相似度度量解决了异构域不平衡增量学习中的原型漂移问题，为现实场景中视觉语言模型的持续学习提供了实用方案。

title: Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning for Building Heating Control and Demand-side Flexibility
summary: Buildings account for approximately 40% of global energy consumption, and with the growing share of intermittent renewable energy sources, enabling demand-side flexibility, particularly in heating, ventilation and air conditioning systems, is essential for grid stability and energy efficiency. This paper presents a safe deep reinforcement learning-based control framework to optimize building space heating while enabling demand-side flexibility provision for power system operators. A deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm is used as the core deep reinforcement learning method, enabling the controller to learn an optimal heating strategy through interaction with the building thermal model while maintaining occupant comfort, minimizing energy cost, and providing flexibility. To address safety concerns with reinforcement learning, particularly regarding compliance with flexibility requests, we propose a real-time adaptive safety-filter to ensure that the system operates within predefined constraints during demand-side flexibility provision. The proposed real-time adaptive safety filter guarantees full compliance with flexibility requests from system operators and improves energy and cost efficiency -- achieving up to 50% savings compared to a rule-based controller -- while outperforming a standalone deep reinforcement learning-based controller in energy and cost metrics, with only a slight increase in comfort temperature violations.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度强化学习的安全控制框架，用于优化建筑供暖系统，在保证舒适度的同时提供需求侧灵活性，实现能源成本节约。
AI.motivation: 建筑能耗占全球40%，随着可再生能源比例增加，供暖系统的需求侧灵活性对电网稳定和能源效率至关重要，但现有方法在安全性和灵活性协调方面存在不足。
AI.method: 采用深度确定性策略梯度算法作为核心强化学习方法，结合实时自适应安全过滤器，确保系统在提供灵活性时始终满足运营商约束条件。
AI.result: 相比基于规则的控制器，节能达50%；在能源和成本指标上优于纯强化学习控制器，仅轻微增加舒适温度违规次数。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的安全强化学习框架能有效协调建筑供暖的灵活性服务、能耗优化与舒适度要求，为电网交互式建筑控制提供了安全可靠的解决方案。

title: Integrating Graphs, Large Language Models, and Agents: Reasoning and Retrieval
summary: Generative AI, particularly Large Language Models, increasingly integrates graph-based representations to enhance reasoning, retrieval, and structured decision-making. Despite rapid advances, there remains limited clarity regarding when, why, where, and what types of graph-LLM integrations are most appropriate across applications. This survey provides a concise, structured overview of the design choices underlying the integration of graphs with LLMs. We categorize existing methods based on their purpose (reasoning, retrieval, generation, recommendation), graph modality (knowledge graphs, scene graphs, interaction graphs, causal graphs, dependency graphs), and integration strategies (prompting, augmentation, training, or agent-based use). By mapping representative works across domains such as cybersecurity, healthcare, materials science, finance, robotics, and multimodal environments, we highlight the strengths, limitations, and best-fit scenarios for each technique. This survey aims to offer researchers a practical guide for selecting the most suitable graph-LLM approach depending on task requirements, data characteristics, and reasoning complexity.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图与大型语言模型（LLM）的集成方法，系统分类了现有技术，并分析了其在各领域的应用场景与选择指南。
AI.motivation: 尽管图与LLM的融合在推理、检索和结构化决策中应用迅速，但缺乏关于何时、为何、如何选择合适集成方法的清晰指导，需要系统化的梳理与总结。
AI.method: 通过分类现有方法，依据目的（推理、检索、生成、推荐）、图模态（知识图谱、场景图、交互图、因果图、依赖图）和集成策略（提示、增强、训练、基于代理）进行结构化分析，并跨领域映射代表性工作。
AI.result: 系统梳理了图-LLM集成的设计选择，明确了不同技术的优势、局限性和适用场景，为跨领域应用提供了实践参考。
AI.conclusion: 本综述为研究者提供了根据任务需求、数据特征和推理复杂度选择最合适图-LLM方法的实用指南，促进了该交叉领域的规范化发展。

title: C-Mining: Unsupervised Discovery of Seeds for Cultural Data Synthesis via Geometric Misalignment
