Representation-space analyses further reveal that the proposed skills occupy structured, separable regions of the failure state space, supporting the view that query-evidence misalignment is a typed rather than monolithic phenomenon.

AI.tldr: 提出Skill-RAG框架，通过诊断检索失败原因并选择相应技能（如查询重写、问题分解等）来纠正查询与证据间的错位，显著提升困难案例的准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应检索方法将检索后失败视为重试信号，而非诊断机会，未能解决查询与证据空间错位的结构性问题，导致大量持续检索失败。
AI.method: 提出Skill-RAG框架，包含轻量级隐藏状态探测器和基于提示的技能路由器。探测器在流水线两阶段控制检索；检测到失败状态时，路由器诊断原因并从四种检索技能（查询重写、问题分解、证据聚焦、退出技能）中选择以纠正错位。
AI.result: 在多个开放域QA和复杂推理基准测试中，Skill-RAG显著提升了多轮检索后困难案例的准确率，尤其在分布外数据集上表现突出；表示空间分析显示技能在失败状态空间中占据结构化、可分离区域。
AI.conclusion: 查询-证据错位是一种类型化而非单一现象，Skill-RAG通过诊断失败原因并应用针对性技能有效纠正错位，为处理持续检索失败提供了新思路。

title: MemEvoBench: Benchmarking Memory MisEvolution in LLM Agents
summary: Equipping Large Language Models (LLMs) with persistent memory enhances interaction continuity and personalization but introduces new safety risks. Specifically, contaminated or biased memory accumulation can trigger abnormal agent behaviors. Existing evaluation methods have not yet established a standardized framework for measuring memory misevolution. This phenomenon refers to the gradual behavioral drift resulting from repeated exposure to misleading information. To address this gap, we introduce MemEvoBench, the first benchmark evaluating long-horizon memory safety in LLM agents against adversarial memory injection, noisy tool outputs, and biased feedback. The framework consists of QA-style tasks across 7 domains and 36 risk types, complemented by workflow-style tasks adapted from 20 Agent-SafetyBench environments with noisy tool returns. Both settings employ mixed benign and misleading memory pools within multi-round interactions to simulate memory evolution. Experiments on representative models reveal substantial safety degradation under biased memory updates. Our analysis suggests that memory evolution is a significant contributor to these failures. Furthermore, static prompt-based defenses prove insufficient, underscoring the urgency of securing memory evolution in LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出了首个评估LLM智能体长期记忆安全性的基准MemEvoBench，用于测试对抗性记忆注入、噪声工具输出和偏见反馈下的行为漂移。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型配备持久记忆虽提升交互连续性，但可能因污染或偏见记忆积累引发异常行为，现有方法缺乏标准化评估框架来测量记忆错误演化现象。
AI.method: 构建包含7个领域36种风险类型的问答任务，以及20个Agent-SafetyBench环境改编的工作流任务，在混合良性/误导性记忆池中进行多轮交互模拟记忆演化，测试代表性模型。
AI.result: 实验显示偏见记忆更新会导致显著安全性退化，记忆演化是故障主因，静态提示防御效果不足。
AI.conclusion: 记忆演化对LLM智能体安全构成重大威胁，需开发针对性防护机制，当前防御手段亟待加强。

title: ASMR-Bench: Auditing for Sabotage in ML Research
summary: As AI systems are increasingly used to conduct research autonomously, misaligned systems could introduce subtle flaws that produce misleading results while evading detection. We introduce ASMR-Bench (Auditing for Sabotage in ML Research), a benchmark for evaluating the ability of auditors to detect sabotage in ML research codebases. ASMR-Bench consists of 9 ML research codebases with sabotaged variants that produce qualitatively different experimental results. Each sabotage modifies implementation details, such as hyperparameters, training data, or evaluation code, while preserving the high-level methodology described in the paper. We evaluated frontier LLMs and LLM-assisted human auditors on ASMR-Bench and found that both struggled to reliably detect sabotage: the best performance was an AUROC of 0.77 and a top-1 fix rate of 42%, achieved by Gemini 3.1 Pro. We also tested LLMs as red teamers and found that LLM-generated sabotages were weaker than human-generated ones but still sometimes evaded same-capability LLM auditors. We release ASMR-Bench to support research on monitoring and auditing techniques for AI-conducted research.

AI.tldr: 提出了ASMR-Bench基准测试，用于评估审计员检测机器学习研究代码中蓄意破坏的能力，发现当前前沿LLM和人类审计员均难以可靠识别此类破坏。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统越来越多地自主进行科学研究，未对齐的系统可能引入难以察觉的缺陷，产生误导性结果却逃避检测，需要开发有效的监控审计方法。
AI.method: 构建包含9个机器学习研究代码库的基准测试，每个代码库包含经过蓄意破坏的变体（修改超参数、训练数据或评估代码等实现细节），评估前沿LLM和LLM辅助人类审计员的检测能力，并测试LLM作为红队生成破坏的能力。
AI.result: 最佳性能由Gemini 3.1 Pro实现（AUROC 0.77，top-1修复率42%）；LLM生成的破坏弱于人类生成，但仍能逃避同能力LLM审计员的检测；整体检测可靠性不足。
AI.conclusion: 当前AI系统和人类审计员在检测研究代码蓄意破坏方面存在显著局限，ASMR-Bench的发布旨在支持AI主导研究的监控与审计技术发展。

title: RefereeBench: Are Video MLLMs Ready to be Multi-Sport Referees
summary: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) excel at generic video understanding, their ability to support specialized, rule-grounded decision-making remains insufficiently explored. In this paper, we introduce RefereeBench, the first large-scale benchmark for evaluating MLLMs as automatic sports referees. Spanning 11 sports with 925 curated videos and 6,475 QA pairs, RefereeBench evaluates five core officiating abilities: foul existence, foul and penalty classification, foul and penalty reasoning, entity perception, and temporal grounding. The benchmark is fully human-annotated to ensure high-quality annotations grounded in authentic officiating logic and multimodal evidence. Extensive evaluations of state-of-the-art MLLMs show that even the strongest models, such as Doubao-Seed-1.8 and Gemini-3-Pro, achieve only around 60% accuracy, while the strongest open-source model, Qwen3-VL, reaches only 47%. These results indicate that current models remain far from being reliable sports referees. Further analysis shows that while models can often identify incidents and involved entities, they struggle with rule application and temporal grounding, and frequently over-call fouls on normal clips. Our benchmark highlights the need for future MLLMs that better integrate domain knowledge and multimodal understanding, advancing trustworthy AI-assisted officiating and broader multimodal decision-making.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个大规模基准测试RefereeBench，用于评估多模态大语言模型在体育裁判任务中的表现，发现当前模型准确率仅约60%，远未达到可靠裁判水平。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在通用视频理解方面表现优异，但其在专业、基于规则的决策能力（如体育裁判）方面尚未得到充分探索，需要专门的评估基准来推动该领域发展。
AI.method: 构建了包含11项运动、925个视频和6,475个问答对的大规模基准测试RefereeBench，评估五种核心裁判能力：犯规存在性判断、犯规与处罚分类、犯规与处罚推理、实体感知和时间定位。所有数据均经过人工标注，确保基于真实裁判逻辑和多模态证据的高质量标注。
AI.result: 对最先进模型的评估显示，最强模型（如Doubao-Seed-1.8和Gemini-3-Pro）准确率仅约60%，最强开源模型Qwen3-VL仅达47%。模型虽能识别事件和实体，但在规则应用、时间定位方面存在困难，且常对正常片段误判为犯规。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型距离成为可靠的体育裁判仍有较大差距，未来需要开发能更好整合领域知识和多模态理解的模型，以推动可信的AI辅助裁判及更广泛的多模态决策系统发展。

title: Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models
comment: 10 pages, 7 figures, Accepted by CVPR 2026 Findings
summary: Recently impressive performance has been achieved in Concept Bottleneck Models (CBM) by utilizing the image-text alignment learned by a large pre-trained vision-language model (i.e. CLIP). However, there exist two key limitations in concept modeling. Existing methods often suffer from pre-training biases, manifested as granularity misalignment or reliance on structural priors. Moreover, fine-tuning with Binary Cross-Entropy (BCE) loss treats each concept independently, which ignores mutual exclusivity among concepts, leading to suboptimal alignment. To address these limitations, we propose Concept-wise Attention for Fine-grained Concept Bottleneck Models (CoAt-CBM), a novel framework that achieves adaptive fine-grained image-concept alignment and high interpretability. Specifically, CoAt-CBM employs learnable concept-wise visual queries to adaptively obtain fine-grained concept-wise visual embeddings, which are then used to produce a concept score vector. Then, a novel concept contrastive optimization guides the model to handle the relative importance of the concept scores, enabling concept predictions to faithfully reflect the image content and improved alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CoAt-CBM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The codes will be available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 提出CoAt-CBM框架，通过概念级视觉查询和对比优化解决概念瓶颈模型中粒度错位和概念独立性假设问题，提升细粒度图像-概念对齐和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有概念瓶颈模型存在预训练偏差（粒度错位/结构先验依赖）和二元交叉熵损失忽略概念互斥性的问题，导致次优对齐。
AI.method: 1. 使用可学习概念级视觉查询自适应获取细粒度概念视觉嵌入；2. 设计概念对比优化策略处理概念分数的相对重要性。
AI.result: 在多个实验中，CoAt-CBM持续优于现有最先进方法，实现了更准确的图像内容反映和对齐效果。
AI.conclusion: CoAt-CBM通过自适应细粒度对齐和对比优化有效解决了概念建模中的关键限制，为可解释性AI提供了改进方案。

title: Seeing the Intangible: Survey of Image Classification into High-Level and Abstract Categories
summary: The field of Computer Vision (CV) is increasingly shifting towards ``high-level'' visual sensemaking tasks, yet the exact nature of these tasks remains unclear and tacit. This survey paper addresses this ambiguity by systematically reviewing research on high-level visual understanding, focusing particularly on Abstract Concepts (ACs) in automatic image classification. Our survey contributes in three main ways: Firstly, it clarifies the tacit understanding of high-level semantics in CV through a multidisciplinary analysis, and categorization into distinct clusters, including commonsense, emotional, aesthetic, and inductive interpretative semantics. Secondly, it identifies and categorizes computer vision tasks associated with high-level visual sensemaking, offering insights into the diverse research areas within this domain. Lastly, it examines how abstract concepts such as values and ideologies are handled in CV, revealing challenges and opportunities in AC-based image classification. Notably, our survey of AC image classification tasks highlights persistent challenges, such as the limited efficacy of massive datasets and the importance of integrating supplementary information and mid-level features. We emphasize the growing relevance of hybrid AI systems in addressing the multifaceted nature of AC image classification tasks. Overall, this survey enhances our understanding of high-level visual reasoning in CV and lays the groundwork for future research endeavors.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了计算机视觉中高层视觉理解的研究，聚焦于抽象概念图像分类，通过多学科分析澄清了高层语义的模糊性，并探讨了相关任务、挑战及混合AI系统的应用前景。
AI.motivation: 计算机视觉领域日益转向“高层”视觉理解任务，但这些任务的具体定义和内涵尚不明确且多为隐含知识，需要系统性的梳理和澄清。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，结合多学科视角分析高层语义，将其分类为常识、情感、美学和归纳解释性语义等类别，并识别和归类相关计算机视觉任务。
AI.result: 明确了高层视觉语义的分类框架；揭示了抽象概念（如价值观、意识形态）在图像分类中的处理方式及挑战；指出大规模数据集在抽象概念分类中效果有限，需结合补充信息和中层特征。
AI.conclusion: 高层视觉理解是计算机视觉的重要发展方向，混合AI系统在应对抽象概念图像分类的复杂性方面具有潜力，本文为未来研究奠定了基础。

title: PIIBench: A Unified Multi-Source Benchmark Corpus for Personally Identifiable Information Detection
summary: We present PIIBench, a unified benchmark corpus for Personally Identifiable Information (PII) detection in natural language text. Existing resources for PII detection are fragmented across domain-specific corpora with mutually incompatible annotation schemes, preventing systematic comparison of detection systems. We consolidate ten publicly available datasets spanning synthetic PII corpora, multilingual Named Entity Recognition (NER) benchmarks, and financial domain annotated text, yielding a corpus of 2,369,883 annotated sequences and 3.35 million entity mentions across 48 canonical PII entity types. We develop a principled normalization pipeline that maps 80+ source-specific label variants to a standardized BIO tagging scheme, applies frequency-based suppression of near absent entity types, and produces stratified 80/10/10 train/validation/test splits preserving source distribution. To establish baseline difficulty, we evaluate eight published systems spanning rule-based engines (Microsoft Presidio), general purpose NER models (spaCy, BERT-base NER, XLM-RoBERTa NER, SpanMarker mBERT, SpanMarker BERT), a PII-specific model (Piiranha DeBERTa), and a financial NER specialist (XtremeDistil FiNER). All systems achieve span-level F1 below 0.14, with the best system (Presidio, F1=0.1385) still producing zero recall on most entity types. These results directly quantify the domain-silo problem and demonstrate that PIIBench presents a substantially harder and more comprehensive evaluation challenge than any existing single source PII dataset. The dataset construction pipeline and benchmark evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/pritesh-2711/pii-bench.

AI.tldr: 提出了PIIBench，一个用于自然语言文本中个人身份信息检测的统一基准语料库，整合了十个公开数据集，包含240万标注序列和335万个实体提及，涵盖48种PII实体类型。
AI.motivation: 现有的PII检测资源分散在领域特定的语料库中，标注方案互不兼容，阻碍了检测系统的系统比较。
AI.method: 整合十个公开数据集，开发了标准化流程，将80多个源特定标签映射到标准BIO标注方案，应用基于频率的实体类型抑制，并生成保留源分布的分层训练/验证/测试分割。评估了八个已发布的系统，包括规则引擎和通用及特定领域NER模型。
AI.result: 所有系统的跨度级F1分数均低于0.14，最佳系统（Presidio，F1=0.1385）在大多数实体类型上召回率为零。
AI.conclusion: PIIBench比任何现有单一源PII数据集提供了更困难、更全面的评估挑战，直接量化了领域孤岛问题。

title: SegMix:Shuffle-based Feedback Learning for Semantic Segmentation of Pathology Images
summary: Segmentation is a critical task in computational pathology, as it identifies areas affected by disease or abnormal growth and is essential for diagnosis and treatment. However, acquiring high-quality pixel-level supervised segmentation data requires significant workload demands from experienced pathologists, limiting the application of deep learning. To overcome this challenge, relaxing the label conditions to image-level classification labels allows for more data to be used and more scenarios to be enabled. One approach is to leverage Class Activation Map (CAM) to generate pseudo pixel-level annotations for semantic segmentation with only image-level labels. However, this method fails to thoroughly explore the essential characteristics of pathology images, thus identifying only small areas that are insufficient for pseudo masking. In this paper, we propose a novel shuffle-based feedback learning method inspired by curriculum learning to generate higher-quality pseudo-semantic segmentation masks. Specifically, we perform patch level shuffle of pathology images, with the model adaptively adjusting the shuffle strategy based on feedback from previous learning. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-arts on three different datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于洗牌反馈学习的方法，利用图像级标签生成更高质量的病理图像伪语义分割掩码，解决像素级标注数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 病理图像分割需要像素级标注，但标注成本高昂且依赖专家经验，限制了深度学习应用。使用图像级分类标签可扩大数据利用范围，但现有CAM方法生成的伪标注质量不足，仅能识别小区域。
AI.method: 提出基于课程学习思想的洗牌反馈学习方法：对病理图像进行块级洗牌，模型根据先前学习反馈自适应调整洗牌策略，以生成更优的伪语义分割掩码。
AI.result: 在三个不同数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的洗牌反馈学习方法能有效提升仅使用图像级标签时伪分割掩码的质量，为病理图像分析提供了更高效的弱监督解决方案。

title: Fed3D: Federated 3D Object Detection
summary: 3D object detection models trained in one server plays an important role in autonomous driving, robotics manipulation, and augmented reality scenarios. However, most existing methods face severe privacy concern when deployed on a multi-robot perception network to explore large-scale 3D scene. Meanwhile, it is highly challenging to employ conventional federated learning methods on 3D object detection scenes, due to the 3D data heterogeneity and limited communication bandwidth. In this paper, we take the first attempt to propose a novel Federated 3D object detection framework (i.e., Fed3D), to enable distributed learning for 3D object detection with privacy preservation. Specifically, considering the irregular input 3D object in local robot and various category distribution between robots could cause local heterogeneity and global heterogeneity, respectively. We then propose a local-global class-aware loss for the 3D data heterogeneity issue, which could balance gradient back-propagation rate of different 3D categories from local and global aspects. To reduce communication cost on each round, we develop a federated 3D prompt module, which could only learn and communicate the prompts with few learnable parameters. To the end, several extensive experiments on federated 3D object detection show that our Fed3D model significantly outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms with lower communication cost when providing the limited local training data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fed3D的新型联邦3D物体检测框架，旨在解决多机器人网络中3D物体检测的隐私保护、数据异构性和通信成本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D物体检测方法在多机器人感知网络中部署时面临严重的隐私问题，且传统联邦学习方法难以应对3D数据异构性和有限通信带宽的挑战。
AI.method: 提出Fed3D框架，包括局部-全局类别感知损失以处理3D数据异构性，以及联邦3D提示模块以减少通信成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，Fed3D在联邦3D物体检测任务中显著优于现有算法，并在有限本地训练数据下实现了更低的通信成本。
AI.conclusion: Fed3D为分布式3D物体检测提供了一种有效的隐私保护解决方案，能够平衡数据异构性和通信效率。

title: A Systematic Study of Training-Free Methods for Trustworthy Large Language Models
summary: As Large Language Models (LLMs) receive increasing attention and are being deployed across various domains, their potential risks, including generating harmful or biased content, producing unsupported claims, and exhibiting vulnerabilities to adversarial attacks, have drawn significant attention. To enable quick and low-cost adaptation, training-free methods have recently emerged as cost-effective alternatives to post-training alignment techniques. Despite their promising results, these methods are evaluated inconsistently across the literature, cover limited dimensions of trustworthiness, and can introduce undesirable side effects, such as utility degradation and increased brittleness. To fully assess the impacts of these training-free methods, we take a step back and systematically re-evaluate the effectiveness of existing training-free methods against various trustworthy settings and their influence on utility, robustness, and computational overhead. We also categorize these methods into three levels (input, internal, and output) based on where they intervene in the model's information flow during inference. Using this taxonomy, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of various representative and effective methods from each level across different LLM families and sizes. Our analysis highlights several trade-offs and unresolved challenges in current approaches. We summarize key findings and limitations in the existing literature, and propose practical recommendations for balancing trustworthiness, utility, and robustness in LLMs without the need for additional training.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了无需训练的LLM对齐方法，通过分类分析揭示了其在可信性、实用性和鲁棒性之间的权衡，并提出了实用建议。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM广泛应用，其生成有害内容、偏见和对抗攻击脆弱性等风险日益凸显。现有无需训练的对齐方法虽成本低，但评估不一致、可信维度覆盖有限，且可能引发实用性下降和脆弱性增加等副作用。
AI.method: 将无需训练方法按推理时干预位置分为输入层、内部层和输出层三类，系统评估不同LLM家族和规模下代表性方法的可信性、实用性、鲁棒性和计算开销。
AI.result: 分析揭示了当前方法在可信性提升与实用性保持、鲁棒性之间的多重权衡，并识别出未解决的技术挑战和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 无需训练对齐方法需更系统评估框架，未来应平衡可信性、实用性和鲁棒性，本文为此提供了分类体系、实证发现和实用建议。

title: CHOP: Chunkwise Context-Preserving Framework for RAG on Multi Documents
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems lose retrieval accuracy when similar documents coexist in the vector database, causing unnecessary information, hallucinations, and factual errors. To alleviate this issue, we propose CHOP, a framework that iteratively evaluates chunk relevance with Large Language Models (LLMs) and progressively reconstructs documents by determining their association with specific topics or query types. CHOP integrates two key components: the CNM-Extractor, which generates compact per-chunk signatures capturing categories, key nouns, and model names, and the Continuity Decision Module, which preserves contextual coherence by deciding whether consecutive chunks belong to the same document flow. By prefixing each chunk with context-aware metadata, CHOP reduces semantic conflicts among similar documents and enhances retriever discrimination. Experiments on benchmark datasets show that CHOP alleviates retrieval confusion and provides a scalable approach for building high-quality knowledge bases, achieving a Top-1 Hit Rate of 90.77% and notable gains in ranking quality metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出了CHOP框架，通过迭代评估文档块相关性并重构文档来解决RAG系统中相似文档共存导致的检索准确性问题。
AI.motivation: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统在向量数据库中存在相似文档时，会导致检索准确性下降、产生不必要信息、幻觉和事实错误，需要解决这一问题。
AI.method: CHOP框架包含两个关键组件：CNM-Extractor（生成包含类别、关键名词和模型名称的紧凑块签名）和连续性决策模块（保持上下文连贯性）。通过为每个块添加上下文感知元数据来减少语义冲突。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，CHOP缓解了检索混淆，实现了90.77%的Top-1命中率，并在排序质量指标上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: CHOP为构建高质量知识库提供了可扩展的方法，能有效增强检索器区分能力并减少相似文档间的语义冲突。

title: Robust Multispectral Semantic Segmentation under Missing or Full Modalities via Structured Latent Projection
summary: Multimodal remote sensing data provide complementary information for semantic segmentation, but in real-world deployments, some modalities may be unavailable due to sensor failures, acquisition issues, or challenging atmospheric conditions. Existing multimodal segmentation models typically address missing modalities by learning a shared representation across inputs. However, this approach can introduce a trade-off by compromising modality-specific complementary information and reducing performance when all modalities are available. In this paper, we tackle this limitation with CBC-SLP, a multimodal semantic segmentation model designed to preserve both modality-invariant and modality-specific information. Inspired by the theoretical results on modality alignment, which state that perfectly aligned multimodal representations can lead to sub-optimal performance in downstream prediction tasks, we propose a novel structured latent projection approach as an architectural inductive bias. Rather than enforcing this strategy through a loss term, we incorporate it directly into the architecture. In particular, to use the complementary information effectively while maintaining robustness under random modality dropout, we structure the latent representations into shared and modality-specific components and adaptively transfer them to the decoder according to the random modality availability mask. Extensive experiments on three multimodal remote sensing image sets demonstrate that CBC-SLP consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multimodal models across full and missing modality scenarios. Besides, we empirically demonstrate that the proposed strategy can recover the complementary information that may not be preserved in a shared representation. The code is available at https://github.com/iremulku/Multispectral-Semantic-Segmentation-via-Structured-Latent-Projection-CBC-SLP-.

AI.tldr: 提出CBC-SLP模型，通过结构化潜在投影保留模态不变和模态特定信息，提升多模态遥感图像语义分割在完整和缺失模态场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态分割模型通过共享表示处理缺失模态，但会损失模态特定互补信息，导致所有模态可用时性能下降。
AI.method: 采用结构化潜在投影作为架构归纳偏置，将潜在表示分为共享和模态特定组件，根据模态可用性掩码自适应传输到解码器。
AI.result: 在三个多模态遥感数据集上，CBC-SLP在完整和缺失模态场景下均优于现有方法，并能恢复共享表示中可能丢失的互补信息。
AI.conclusion: CBC-SLP通过显式建模共享和模态特定表示，有效平衡了模态互补信息利用和缺失模态鲁棒性，为多模态分割提供了新思路。

title: Beyond a Single Frame: Multi-Frame Spatially Grounded Reasoning Across Volumetric MRI
summary: Spatial reasoning and visual grounding are core capabilities for vision-language models (VLMs), yet most medical VLMs produce predictions without transparent reasoning or spatial evidence. Existing benchmarks also evaluate VLMs on isolated 2D images, overlooking the volumetric nature of clinical imaging, where findings can span multiple frames or appear on only a few slices. We introduce Spatially Grounded MRI Visual Question Answering (SGMRI-VQA), a 41,307-pair benchmark for multi-frame, spatially grounded reasoning on volumetric MRI. Built from expert radiologist annotations in the fastMRI+ dataset across brain and knee studies, each QA pair includes a clinician-aligned chain-of-thought trace with frame-indexed bounding box coordinates. Tasks are organized hierarchically across detection, localization, counting/classification, and captioning, requiring models to jointly reason about what is present, where it is, and across which frames it extends. We benchmark 10 VLMs and show that supervised fine-tuning of Qwen3-VL-8B with bounding box supervision consistently improves grounding performance over strong zero-shot baselines, indicating that targeted spatial supervision is an effective path toward grounded clinical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了SGMRI-VQA基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在医学MRI图像上的空间推理和视觉定位能力，并通过实验证明有针对性的空间监督能有效提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有医学视觉语言模型缺乏透明推理和空间证据，且现有基准测试仅关注2D图像，忽略了临床影像的立体特性，无法评估模型在跨帧空间推理上的能力。
AI.method: 基于fastMRI+数据集构建了包含41,307个问答对的SGMRI-VQA基准，包含放射科专家标注的链式思维轨迹和帧索引边界框坐标；将任务分层为检测、定位、计数/分类和描述；对10个视觉语言模型进行基准测试，并对Qwen3-VL-8B模型进行带边界框监督的微调。
AI.result: 监督微调的Qwen3-VL-8B模型在空间定位性能上持续优于强零样本基线模型，表明有针对性的空间监督能有效提升临床推理的定位能力。
AI.conclusion: SGMRI-VQA基准填补了医学视觉语言模型在立体影像空间推理评估上的空白，实验证明空间监督是提升临床推理定位能力的有效途径。

title: CoEvolve: Training LLM Agents via Agent-Data Mutual Evolution
summary: Reinforcement learning for LLM agents is typically conducted on a static data distribution, which fails to adapt to the agent's evolving behavior and leads to poor coverage of complex environment interactions. To address these challenges, we propose CoEvolve, an agent-data mutual evolution framework that enables LLM agents to improve through closed-loop, interaction-driven training. Specifically, CoEvolve extracts feedback signals such as forgetting and uncertainty from rollout trajectories to identify failure-prone interaction patterns, and utilizes them to guide LLM-based task synthesis. The synthesized tasks are validated through environment interaction and utilized to update the data distribution, enabling joint adaptation of the agent and its data. Extensive experiments on AppWorld and BFCL across Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen3-4B, and Qwen3-30B-A3B demonstrate consistent and significant improvements over strong base models, yielding absolute gains of 19.43%, 15.58%, and 18.14%, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出CoEvolve框架，通过智能体与数据的协同进化解决强化学习中静态数据分布的问题，在多个基准测试中显著提升LLM智能体性能。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM智能体强化学习使用静态数据分布，无法适应智能体行为演化，导致复杂环境交互覆盖不足。
AI.method: CoEvolve框架：1）从轨迹中提取遗忘和不确定性等反馈信号识别易失败交互模式；2）基于LLM的任务合成；3）通过环境交互验证任务并更新数据分布，实现智能体与数据的联合适应。
AI.result: 在AppWorld和BFCL基准测试中，对Qwen2.5-7B、Qwen3-4B和Qwen3-30B-A3B模型分别实现19.43%、15.58%和18.14%的绝对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CoEvolve通过闭环交互驱动训练实现了智能体与数据的协同进化，能有效提升LLM智能体在复杂环境中的适应能力。

title: Aligning What Vision-Language Models See and Perceive with Adaptive Information Flow
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capability in a wide range of tasks such as visual recognition, document parsing, and visual grounding. Nevertheless, recent work shows that while VLMs often manage to capture the correct image region corresponding to the question, they do not necessarily produce the correct answers. In this work, we demonstrate that this misalignment could be attributed to suboptimal information flow within VLMs, where text tokens distribute too much attention to irrelevant visual tokens, leading to incorrect answers. Based on the observation, we show that modulating the information flow during inference can improve the perception capability of VLMs. The idea is that text tokens should only be associated with important visual tokens during decoding, eliminating the interference of irrelevant regions. To achieve this, we propose a token dynamics-based method to determine the importance of visual tokens, where visual tokens that exhibit distinct activation patterns during different decoding stages are viewed as important. We apply our approach to representative open-source VLMs and evaluate on various datasets, including visual question answering, visual grounding and counting, optical character recognition, and object hallucination. The results show that our approach significantly improves the performance of baselines. Project page: https://cxliu0.github.io/AIF/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于令牌动态的方法来优化视觉语言模型的信息流，通过识别重要视觉令牌并减少无关视觉令牌的干扰，显著提升了模型在多项视觉语言任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在回答问题时，虽然能关注到正确的图像区域，却常给出错误答案。研究发现，这可能是由于文本令牌在解码过程中过度关注无关视觉令牌，导致信息流不理想。
AI.method: 提出一种基于令牌动态的视觉令牌重要性评估方法：在解码的不同阶段，激活模式差异显著的视觉令牌被视为重要令牌。通过调节推理时的信息流，使文本令牌仅与重要视觉令牌关联，减少无关区域的干扰。
AI.result: 在多个开源视觉语言模型上验证，涵盖视觉问答、视觉定位与计数、光学字符识别和物体幻觉等数据集。实验结果表明，该方法能显著提升基线模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过调节视觉语言模型推理时的信息流，聚焦重要视觉令牌，可有效提升模型的感知能力，解决答案与视觉关注区域不匹配的问题。

title: Qwen3.5-Omni Technical Report
summary: In this work, we present Qwen3.5-Omni, the latest advancement in the Qwen-Omni model family. Representing a significant evolution over its predecessor, Qwen3.5-Omni scales to hundreds of billions of parameters and supports a 256k context length. By leveraging a massive dataset comprising heterogeneous text-vision pairs and over 100 million hours of audio-visual content, the model demonstrates robust omni-modality capabilities. Qwen3.5-Omni-plus achieves SOTA results across 215 audio and audio-visual understanding, reasoning, and interaction subtasks and benchmarks, surpassing Gemini-3.1 Pro in key audio tasks and matching it in comprehensive audio-visual understanding. Architecturally, Qwen3.5-Omni employs a Hybrid Attention Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework for both Thinker and Talker, enabling efficient long-sequence inference. The model facilitates sophisticated interaction, supporting over 10 hours of audio understanding and 400 seconds of 720P video (at 1 FPS). To address the inherent instability and unnaturalness in streaming speech synthesis, often caused by encoding efficiency discrepancies between text and speech tokenizers, we introduce ARIA. ARIA dynamically aligns text and speech units, significantly enhancing the stability and prosody of conversational speech with minimal latency impact. Furthermore, Qwen3.5-Omni expands linguistic boundaries, supporting multilingual understanding and speech generation across 10 languages with human-like emotional nuance. Finally, Qwen3.5-Omni exhibits superior audio-visual grounding capabilities, generating script-level structured captions with precise temporal synchronization and automated scene segmentation. Remarkably, we observed the emergence of a new capability in omnimodal models: directly performing coding based on audio-visual instructions, which we call Audio-Visual Vibe Coding.

AI.tldr: 介绍了Qwen3.5-Omni模型，这是一个支持文本、视觉、音频多模态的大规模模型，在多项任务中达到SOTA水平，并引入了ARIA技术提升语音合成质量。
AI.motivation: 为了开发一个能够处理多种模态（文本、视觉、音频）且支持长上下文、高效推理的通用模型，以解决现有模型在跨模态理解、交互和生成方面的不足。
AI.method: 采用混合注意力专家混合（Hybrid Attention Mixture-of-Experts）框架，使用大规模异构文本-视觉对和音频-视觉数据进行训练，并引入ARIA技术动态对齐文本和语音单元以提升流式语音合成质量。
AI.result: 模型在215个音频和音频-视觉理解、推理和交互子任务中达到SOTA，在关键音频任务上超越Gemini-3.1 Pro，支持10小时音频理解和400秒720P视频处理，并展现出音频-视觉编程等新能力。
AI.conclusion: Qwen3.5-Omni在多模态理解、生成和交互方面取得显著进展，其架构和技术创新为大规模多模态模型的发展提供了新方向，并展示了跨模态编程等新兴能力。

title: DiZiNER: Disagreement-guided Instruction Refinement via Pilot Annotation Simulation for Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition
comment: 9 pages, 3 figures; Accepted to the ACL 2026 Main Conference
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have advanced information extraction (IE) by enabling zero-shot and few-shot named entity recognition (NER), yet their generative outputs still show persistent and systematic errors. Despite progress through instruction fine-tuning, zero-shot NER still lags far behind supervised systems. These recurring errors mirror inconsistencies observed in early-stage human annotation processes that resolve disagreements through pilot annotation. Motivated by this analogy, we introduce DiZiNER (Disagreement-guided Instruction Refinement via Pilot Annotation Simulation for Zero-shot Named Entity Recognition), a framework that simulates the pilot annotation process, employing LLMs to act as both annotators and supervisors. Multiple heterogeneous LLMs annotate shared texts, and a supervisor model analyzes inter-model disagreements to refine task instructions. Across 18 benchmarks, DiZiNER achieves zero-shot SOTA results on 14 datasets, improving prior bests by +8.0 F1 and reducing the zero-shot to supervised gap by over +11 points. It also consistently outperforms its supervisor, GPT-5 mini, indicating that improvements stem from disagreement-guided instruction refinement rather than model capacity. Pairwise agreement between models shows a strong correlation with NER performance, further supporting this finding.

AI.tldr: 提出DiZiNER框架，通过模拟人类标注中的分歧解决过程，利用大语言模型作为标注者和监督者，优化零样本命名实体识别任务指令，在18个基准测试中取得14个SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在零样本命名实体识别中仍存在系统性错误，性能远低于监督系统，这些错误与人类早期标注过程中的不一致性相似，因此借鉴人类通过试点标注解决分歧的方法来改进模型。
AI.method: DiZiNER框架模拟试点标注过程：让多个异构大语言模型对相同文本进行标注，再由监督模型分析模型间的分歧，据此优化任务指令。
AI.result: 在18个基准测试中，DiZiNER在14个数据集上达到零样本SOTA，F1值比之前最佳结果提升8.0，将零样本与监督系统的差距缩小超过11个百分点；且始终优于其监督模型GPT-5 mini，表明性能提升源于分歧引导的指令优化而非模型容量。
AI.conclusion: 模型间的一致性程度与命名实体识别性能强相关，验证了通过模拟人类标注分歧解决过程来优化指令的有效性，为提升零样本信息提取性能提供了新途径。

title: Exploring the Capability Boundaries of LLMs in Mastering of Chinese Chouxiang Language
summary: While large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general language tasks, their performance on Chouxiang Language, a representative subcultural language in the Chinese internet context, remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we introduce Mouse, a specialized benchmark designed to evaluate the capabilities of LLMs on NLP tasks involving Chouxiang Language across six tasks. Experimental results show that, current state-of-the-art (SOTA) LLMs exhibit clear limitations on multiple tasks, while performing well on tasks that involve contextual semantic understanding. In addition, we further discuss the reasons behind the generally low performance of SOTA LLMs on Chouxiang Language, examine whether the LLM-as-a-judge approach adopted for translation tasks aligns with human judgments and values, and analyze the key factors that influence Chouxiang translation. Our study aims to promote further research in the NLP community on multicultural integration and the dynamics of evolving internet languages. Our code and data are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Mouse基准测试，用于评估大语言模型在抽象话（一种中文网络亚文化语言）上的表现，发现当前SOTA模型在多个任务上存在明显局限，但在涉及上下文语义理解的任务上表现良好。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在通用语言任务上取得了显著成功，但它们在中文互联网亚文化语言——抽象话上的表现尚未得到充分探索，这促使研究者开发专门的评估基准。
AI.method: 研究者构建了Mouse基准测试，包含六个任务来评估大语言模型处理抽象话的能力，并进一步分析了模型表现不佳的原因，检验了LLM-as-a-judge方法在翻译任务中与人类判断的一致性，以及影响抽象话翻译的关键因素。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，当前最先进的大语言模型在多个抽象话任务上存在明显局限性，但在涉及上下文语义理解的任务上表现较好。研究还发现LLM-as-a-judge方法在翻译评估中与人类判断存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了当前大语言模型在处理抽象话等网络亚文化语言方面的不足，旨在促进NLP社区对多元文化融合和动态演变的互联网语言的进一步研究。代码和数据已公开。

title: UniEditBench: A Unified and Cost-Effective Benchmark for Image and Video Editing via Distilled MLLMs
summary: The evaluation of visual editing models remains fragmented across methods and modalities. Existing benchmarks are often tailored to specific paradigms, making fair cross-paradigm comparisons difficult, while video editing lacks reliable evaluation benchmarks. Furthermore, common automatic metrics often misalign with human preference, yet directly deploying large multimodal models (MLLMs) as evaluators incurs prohibitive computational and financial costs. We present UniEditBench, a unified benchmark for image and video editing that supports reconstruction-based and instruction-driven methods under a shared protocol. UniEditBench includes a structured taxonomy of nine image operations (Add, Remove, Replace, Change, Stroke-based, Extract, Adjust, Count, Reorder) and eight video operations, with coverage of challenging compositional tasks such as counting and spatial reordering. To enable scalable evaluation, we distill a high-capacity MLLM judge (Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B Instruct) into lightweight 4B/8B evaluators that provide multi-dimensional scoring over structural fidelity, text alignment, background consistency, naturalness, and temporal-spatial consistency (for videos). Experiments show that the distilled evaluators maintain strong agreement with human judgments and substantially reduce deployment cost relative to the teacher model. UniEditBench provides a practical and reproducible protocol for benchmarking modern visual editing methods. Our benchmark and the associated reward models are publicly available at https://github.com/wesar1/UniEditBench.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个统一的图像和视频编辑基准UniEditBench，支持重建式和指令驱动式方法，并蒸馏了轻量级评估器以降低大模型评估成本。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉编辑评估方法存在碎片化问题：不同范式难以公平比较，视频编辑缺乏可靠基准，自动评估指标与人类偏好不一致，而直接使用大模型评估成本过高。
AI.method: 构建了包含9种图像操作和8种视频操作的统一基准，并提出通过知识蒸馏将大模型（Qwen3-VL-235B）压缩为轻量级（4B/8B）评估器，从多个维度进行评分。
AI.result: 蒸馏后的评估器在保持与人类判断高度一致的同时，显著降低了部署成本，基准支持对复杂组合任务（如计数、空间重排）的评估。
AI.conclusion: UniEditBench为现代视觉编辑方法提供了实用且可复现的评估协议，其基准和奖励模型已开源，有助于推动领域标准化评估。

title: Watching Movies Like a Human: Egocentric Emotion Understanding for Embodied Companions
summary: Embodied robotic agents often perceive movies through an egocentric screen-view interface rather than native cinematic footage, introducing domain shifts such as viewpoint distortion, scale variation, illumination changes, and environmental interference. However, existing research on movie emotion understanding is almost exclusively conducted on cinematic footage, limiting cross-domain generalization to real-world viewing scenarios. To bridge this gap, we introduce EgoScreen-Emotion (ESE), the first benchmark dataset for egocentric screen-view movie emotion understanding. ESE contains 224 movie trailers captured under controlled egocentric screen-view conditions, producing 28,667 temporally aligned key-frames annotated by multiple raters with a confidence-aware multi-label protocol to address emotional ambiguity. We further build a multimodal long-context emotion reasoning framework that models temporal visual evidence, narrative summaries, compressed historical context, and audio cues. Cross-domain experiments reveal a severe domain gap: models trained on cinematic footage drop from 27.99 to 16.69 Macro-F1 when evaluated on realistic egocentric screen-view observations. Training on ESE substantially improves robustness under realistic viewing conditions. Our approach achieves competitive performance compared with strong closed-source multimodal models, highlighting the importance of domain-specific data and long-context multimodal reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个面向自我中心屏幕视角电影情感理解的基准数据集ESE，并构建了多模态长上下文情感推理框架，以解决现有研究在真实观看场景中的领域泛化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有电影情感理解研究主要基于电影原生镜头，而现实中的具身机器人通常通过自我中心屏幕视角感知电影，存在视角畸变、尺度变化等域偏移问题，导致跨域泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 1. 构建ESE数据集：包含224个受控条件下采集的电影预告片，28,667个时序对齐关键帧，采用置信度感知的多标签标注协议；2. 提出多模态长上下文情感推理框架，整合时序视觉证据、叙事摘要、压缩历史上下文和音频线索。
AI.result: 跨域实验显示严重领域差距：在电影原生数据训练的模型在自我中心屏幕视角数据上Macro-F1从27.99降至16.69；使用ESE训练显著提升模型在真实观看条件下的鲁棒性；所提方法性能与强闭源多模态模型相当。
AI.conclusion: 领域特定数据和长上下文多模态推理对真实场景情感理解至关重要，ESE数据集和所提框架为具身智能的跨域情感理解提供了有效解决方案。

title: SSFT: A Lightweight Spectral-Spatial Fusion Transformer for Generic Hyperspectral Classification
comment: This paper has been accepted at IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Workshops (CVPRW), 2026
summary: Hyperspectral imaging enables fine-grained recognition of materials by capturing rich spectral signatures, but learning robust classifiers is challenging due to high dimensionality, spectral redundancy, limited labeled data, and strong domain shifts. Beyond earth observation, labeled HSI data is often scarce and imbalanced, motivating compact models for generic hyperspectral classification across diverse acquisition regimes. We propose the lightweight Spectral-Spatial Fusion Transformer (SSFT), which factorizes representation learning into spectral and spatial pathways and integrates them via cross-attention to capture complementary wavelength-dependent and structural information. We evaluate our SSFT on the challenging HSI-Benchmark, a heterogeneous multi-dataset benchmark covering earth observation, fruit condition assessment, and fine-grained material recognition. SSFT achieves state-of-the-art overall performance, ranking first while using less than 2% of the parameters of the previous leading method. We further evaluate transfer to the substantially larger SpectralEarth benchmark under the official protocol, where SSFT remains competitive despite its compact size. Ablation studies show that both spectral and spatial pathways are crucial, with spatial modeling contributing most, and that SSFT remains robust without data augmentation.

AI.tldr: 提出轻量级光谱-空间融合Transformer（SSFT），通过分解光谱与空间路径学习并交叉注意力融合，在异构HSI基准上实现SOTA性能且参数量极少
AI.motivation: 高光谱成像面临高维、光谱冗余、标记数据稀缺及域偏移等挑战，尤其在非地球观测领域数据稀缺且不平衡，需紧凑模型适应多样化采集场景
AI.method: 设计双路径Transformer架构：光谱路径学习波长依赖特征，空间路径提取结构信息，通过交叉注意力融合互补信息，参数量小于先前方法的2%
AI.result: 在异构多数据集HSI-Benchmark上取得最优综合性能；在更大规模SpectralEarth基准迁移评估中保持竞争力；消融实验证实双路径必要性且空间建模贡献最大
AI.conclusion: SSFT通过高效的光谱-空间解耦与融合机制，实现了轻量化高光谱分类，在数据稀缺场景下具有强鲁棒性，为跨领域应用提供实用解决方案

title: Beyond Text Prompts: Precise Concept Erasure through Text-Image Collaboration
summary: Text-to-image generative models have achieved impressive fidelity and diversity, but can inadvertently produce unsafe or undesirable content due to implicit biases embedded in large-scale training datasets. Existing concept erasure methods, whether text-only or image-assisted, face trade-offs: textual approaches often fail to fully suppress concepts, while naive image-guided methods risk over-erasing unrelated content. We propose TICoE, a text-image Collaborative Erasing framework that achieves precise and faithful concept removal through a continuous convex concept manifold and hierarchical visual representation learning. TICoE precisely removes target concepts while preserving unrelated semantic and visual content. To objectively assess the quality of erasure, we further introduce a fidelity-oriented evaluation strategy that measures post-erasure usability. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that TICoE surpasses prior methods in concept removal precision and content fidelity, enabling safer, more controllable text-to-image generation. Our code is available at https://github.com/OpenAscent-L/TICoE.git

AI.tldr: 提出TICoE框架，通过文本-图像协同机制实现精确的概念擦除，提升文本到图像生成的安全性和可控性
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型可能因训练数据中的隐含偏见产生不安全内容，而现有概念擦除方法存在擦除不彻底或过度擦除的问题
AI.method: 采用连续凸概念流形和分层视觉表示学习，构建文本-图像协同擦除框架，并引入面向保真度的评估策略
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，TICoE在概念擦除精度和内容保真度方面优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: TICoE能够精确移除目标概念同时保留无关内容，为更安全可控的文本到图像生成提供了有效解决方案

title: AgentV-RL: Scaling Reward Modeling with Agentic Verifier
summary: Verifiers have been demonstrated to enhance LLM reasoning via test-time scaling (TTS). Yet, they face significant challenges in complex domains. Error propagation from incorrect intermediate reasoning can lead to false positives for seemingly plausible solutions, while lacking external grounding makes verifiers unreliable on computation or knowledge-intensive tasks. To address these challenges, we propose Agentic Verifier, a framework that transforms reward modeling into a multi-turn, tool-augmented deliberative process. We introduce complementary forward and backward agents: one traces solutions from premises to conclusions, while the other re-checks conclusions against their underlying premises. This bidirectional process enables a comprehensive, reliable, and interpretable assessment of solutions. To facilitate practical deployment, we propose AgentV-RL. Through proactive exploration and reinforcement learning, the verifier autonomously interleaves tool-use with internal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that Agentic Verifier yields consistent performance gains under both parallel and sequential TTS. Notably, our 4B variant surpasses state-of-the-art ORMs by 25.2%, positioning it as a promising paradigm for agentic reward modeling.

AI.tldr: 提出Agentic Verifier框架，通过双向代理（前向与后向）结合工具增强的审慎过程，改进LLM推理验证，在复杂任务中显著提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统验证器在复杂领域面临挑战：错误中间推理导致误判，缺乏外部依据使其在计算或知识密集型任务中不可靠。
AI.method: 1. 设计双向代理框架：前向代理从前提推导结论，后向代理从结论反查前提；2. 提出AgentV-RL，通过强化学习自主交替使用工具与内部推理。
AI.result: 实验显示Agentic Verifier在并行与顺序TTS中均取得稳定提升，4B参数版本超越现有最佳ORM 25.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为智能奖励建模提供了可靠、可解释的评估范式，显著增强了复杂领域下的验证能力。

title: CiPO: Counterfactual Unlearning for Large Reasoning Models through Iterative Preference Optimization
summary: Machine unlearning has gained increasing attention in recent years, as a promising technique to selectively remove unwanted privacy or copyrighted information from Large Language Models that are trained on a massive scale of human data. However, the emergence of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), which emphasize long chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning to address complex questions, presents a dilemma to unlearning: existing methods either struggle to completely eliminate undesired knowledge from the CoT traces or degrade the reasoning performances due to the interference with the reasoning process. To this end, we introduce Counterfactual Unlearning through iterative Preference Optimization (CiPO), a novel framework that redefines unlearning as the targeted intervention of the CoT reasoning in LRMs. More specifically, given a desired unlearning target answer, CiPO instructs LRMs to generate a logically valid counterfactual reasoning trace for preference tuning. As the LRM adjusts to the counterfactual trace, CiPO iteratively updates the preference learning data to increase the discrepancy from the original model. This iterative loop ensures both desirable unlearning and smooth optimization, effectively mitigating the dilemma. Experiments on challenging benchmarks demonstrate that CiPO excels at unlearning, completely removing knowledge from both the intermediate CoT steps and the final answer, while preserving the reasoning abilities of LRMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CiPO框架，通过迭代偏好优化实现大语言模型的反事实遗忘，有效消除目标知识同时保持推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有遗忘方法难以从大推理模型的思维链中完全消除隐私/版权信息，且容易干扰推理性能，需要解决这一困境。
AI.method: 提出反事实遗忘迭代偏好优化框架，针对目标遗忘答案生成逻辑有效的反事实推理轨迹，通过迭代更新偏好学习数据扩大与原模型的差异。
AI.result: 在挑战性基准测试中，CiPO能完全消除思维链中间步骤和最终答案中的知识，同时保持大推理模型的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: CiPO通过重新定义遗忘为对思维链推理的针对性干预，有效解决了大推理模型中的遗忘困境，实现了知识消除与性能保持的平衡。

title: Disentangling Mathematical Reasoning in LLMs: A Methodological Investigation of Internal Mechanisms
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities, yet their internal mechanisms for handling reasoning-intensive tasks remain underexplored. To advance the understanding of model-internal processing mechanisms, we present an investigation of how LLMs perform arithmetic operations by examining internal mechanisms during task execution. Using early decoding, we trace how next-token predictions are constructed across layers. Our experiments reveal that while the models recognize arithmetic tasks early, correct result generation occurs only in the final layers. Notably, models proficient in arithmetic exhibit a clear division of labor between attention and MLP modules, where attention propagates input information and MLP modules aggregate it. This division is absent in less proficient models. Furthermore, successful models appear to process more challenging arithmetic tasks functionally, suggesting reasoning capabilities beyond factual recall.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析大语言模型在算术任务中的内部处理机制，揭示了模型在推理过程中的分层处理模式及注意力与MLP模块的分工协作。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在推理密集型任务上表现出色，但其内部处理机制尚不明确，特别是算术运算这类需要逐步推理的任务。研究旨在揭示模型如何通过内部计算实现复杂推理。
AI.method: 采用早期解码技术追踪模型各层对下一个token预测的构建过程，通过对比不同算术能力的模型在注意力模块和MLP模块中的激活模式来分析内部机制。
AI.result: 研究发现：1）模型早期识别算术任务，但正确结果仅在最后几层生成；2）擅长算术的模型中，注意力模块负责传播输入信息，MLP模块负责信息聚合，两者分工明确；3）能力较弱的模型缺乏这种分工；4）成功模型对更复杂的算术任务表现出超越事实记忆的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在算术任务中通过模块化分工实现推理，注意力与MLP的功能分离是模型算术能力的关键特征，这为理解模型内部推理机制提供了新视角。

title: Learning to Look before Learning to Like: Incorporating Human Visual Cognition into Aesthetic Quality Assessment
comment: Accepted for Poster Presentation at CogSci 2026
summary: Automated Aesthetic Quality Assessment (AQA) treats images primarily as static pixel vectors, aligning predictions with human-rating scores largely through semantic perception. However, this paradigm diverges from human aesthetic cognition, which arises from dynamic visual exploration shaped by scanning paths, processing fluency, and the interplay between bottom-up salience and top-down intention. We introduce AestheticNet, a novel cognitive-inspired AQA paradigm that integrates human-like visual cognition and semantic perception with a two-pathway architecture. The visual attention pathway, implemented as a gaze-aligned visual encoder (GAVE) pre-trained offline on eye-tracking data using resource-efficient contrast gaze alignment, models attention from human vision system. This pathway augments the semantic pathway, which uses a fixed semantic encoder such as CLIP, through cross-attention fusion. Visual attention provides a cognitive prior reflecting foreground/background structure, color cascade, brightness, and lighting, all of which are determinants of aesthetic perception beyond semantics. Experiments validated by hypothesis testing show a consistent improvement over the semantic-alone baselines, and demonstrate the gaze module as a model-agnostic corrector compatible with diverse AQA backbones, supporting the necessity and modularity of human-like visual cognition for AQA. Our code is available at https://github.com/keepgallop/AestheticNet.

AI.tldr: 提出AestheticNet，一种受人类视觉认知启发的图像美学质量评估新范式，通过视觉注意力和语义感知双路径架构提升评估性能。
AI.motivation: 现有自动化美学质量评估方法主要基于静态像素向量和语义感知，与人类动态视觉探索的审美认知过程存在差异，需要更贴近人类视觉认知的评估模型。
AI.method: 采用双路径架构：视觉注意力路径使用基于眼动数据预训练的GAVE编码器模拟人类视觉系统；语义路径使用CLIP等固定语义编码器；通过跨注意力融合两路径信息。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，该方法相比仅使用语义的基线模型有持续改进，视觉注意力模块可作为模型无关的校正器兼容多种AQA骨干网络。
AI.conclusion: 人类视觉认知对于美学质量评估具有必要性和模块化价值，视觉注意力提供的认知先验能有效增强语义感知，提升评估性能。

title: Where does output diversity collapse in post-training?
summary: Post-trained language models produce less varied outputs than their base counterparts. This output diversity collapse undermines inference-time scaling methods that rely on varied samples, and risks homogenizing model outputs on creative and value-laden tasks. Prior work attributes collapse to specific post-training methods, without separating the role of training data composition from the method, or the generation format from the model weights. We trace output diversity through three parallel post-training lineages of Olmo 3, Think (chain-of-thought distillation), Instruct (broad multi-source data), and RL-Zero, across 15 tasks and four text diversity metrics. We find that the location of collapse co-varies with data composition: the Think lineage loses most semantic diversity at supervised fine-tuning, and the effect of DPO is larger in Instruct than in Think. Suppressing chain-of-thought reasoning at inference in Think models drops accuracy on hard tasks, yet leaves answer-level diversity unchanged, showing that the collapse is embedded in the model weights by training data, not imposed by the generation format. Decomposing diversity loss on six verifiable tasks into a quality-control component (removal of incorrect outputs) and a residual component (genuine narrowing among correct outputs) reveals that the split is task-dependent, and Think models retain more correct-answer diversity than Instruct despite collapsing more in aggregate. Our results indicate that diversity collapse is determined during training by data composition and cannot be addressed at inference time alone.

AI.tldr: 研究发现语言模型后训练中的输出多样性崩溃主要由训练数据组成决定，而非生成格式或特定后训练方法，且崩溃嵌入模型权重中，无法仅通过推理时调整解决。
AI.motivation: 后训练语言模型输出多样性低于基础模型，这削弱了依赖多样样本的推理时扩展方法，并可能在创意和价值负载任务中导致输出同质化。先前研究未区分训练数据组成与后训练方法、生成格式与模型权重的作用。
AI.method: 通过Olmo 3的三个并行后训练谱系（Think-思维链蒸馏、Instruct-多源数据、RL-Zero），在15个任务和四个文本多样性指标上追踪输出多样性，分析数据组成影响，并在六个可验证任务中分解多样性损失为质量控制成分和残余成分。
AI.result: 多样性崩溃位置与数据组成共变：Think谱系在监督微调时失去最多语义多样性；DPO在Instruct中影响大于Think；抑制Think模型的思维链推理会降低困难任务准确率但不改变答案级多样性；Think模型比Instruct保留更多正确答案多样性。
AI.conclusion: 多样性崩溃由训练期间的数据组成决定，并嵌入模型权重中，无法仅通过推理时干预解决；崩溃中质量控制与真实窄化的比例依赖任务，且不同训练谱系保留的正确答案多样性不同。

title: How Hypocritical Is Your LLM judge? Listener-Speaker Asymmetries in the Pragmatic Competence of Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly studied as repositories of linguistic knowledge. In this line of work, models are commonly evaluated both as generators of language and as judges of linguistic output, yet these two roles are rarely examined in direct relation to one another. As a result, it remains unclear whether success in one role aligns with success in the other. In this paper, we address this question for pragmatic competence by comparing LLMs' performance as pragmatic listeners, judging the appropriateness of linguistic outputs, and as pragmatic speakers, generating pragmatically appropriate language. We evaluate multiple open-weight and proprietary LLMs across three pragmatic settings. We find a robust asymmetry between pragmatic evaluation and pragmatic generation: many models perform substantially better as listeners than as speakers. Our results suggest that pragmatic judging and pragmatic generation are only weakly aligned in current LLMs, calling for more integrated evaluation practices.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大型语言模型在语用能力上存在听者（判断语言适当性）与说者（生成适当语言）之间的不对称表现，多数模型作为听者表现更佳。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型常被同时用作语言生成器和语言输出评判者，但这两个角色之间的表现关联性很少被直接研究，不清楚一个角色的成功是否对应另一个角色的成功。
AI.method: 比较多个开源和专有大型语言模型在三种语用场景下的表现：作为语用听者（判断语言适当性）和作为语用说者（生成语用适当的语言）。
AI.result: 发现语用评价与语用生成之间存在显著不对称性：许多模型作为听者的表现明显优于作为说者的表现。
AI.conclusion: 当前大型语言模型中语用判断与语用生成仅弱相关，需要更综合的评估方法。

title: AHS: Adaptive Head Synthesis via Synthetic Data Augmentations
summary: Recent digital media advancements have created increasing demands for sophisticated portrait manipulation techniques, particularly head swapping, where one's head is seamlessly integrated with another's body. However, current approaches predominantly rely on face-centered cropped data with limited view angles, significantly restricting their real-world applicability. They struggle with diverse head expressions, varying hairstyles, and natural blending beyond facial regions. To address these limitations, we propose Adaptive Head Synthesis (AHS), which effectively handles full upper-body images with varied head poses and expressions. AHS incorporates a novel head reenacted synthetic data augmentation strategy to overcome self-supervised training constraints, enhancing generalization across diverse facial expressions and orientations without requiring paired training data. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that AHS achieves superior performance in challenging real-world scenarios, producing visually coherent results that preserve identity and expression fidelity across various head orientations and hairstyles. Notably, AHS shows exceptional robustness in maintaining facial identity while drastic expression changes and faithfully preserving accessories while significant head pose variations.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应头部合成（AHS）方法，用于处理全身图像中的头部替换，克服现有方法在头部姿态、表情和发型多样性上的限制。
AI.motivation: 当前头部替换方法主要基于面部裁剪数据，视角有限，难以处理真实场景中多样的头部姿态、表情和发型，且无法实现面部区域外的自然融合。
AI.method: 采用自适应头部合成（AHS）框架，结合头部重演合成数据增强策略，无需配对训练数据，提升对不同面部表情和方向的泛化能力。
AI.result: AHS在真实场景中表现优异，能生成视觉一致的结果，保持身份和表情保真度，并在剧烈表情变化和头部姿态变化时保持鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AHS方法有效解决了现有头部替换技术的局限性，在多样化的真实场景中实现了高质量的头部合成。

title: Towards Intrinsic Interpretability of Large Language Models:A Survey of Design Principles and Architectures
comment: Accepted to the Main Conference of ACL 2026. 14 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved strong performance across many NLP tasks, their opaque internal mechanisms hinder trustworthiness and safe deployment. Existing surveys in explainable AI largely focus on post-hoc explanation methods that interpret trained models through external approximations. In contrast, intrinsic interpretability, which builds transparency directly into model architectures and computations, has recently emerged as a promising alternative. This paper presents a systematic review of the recent advances in intrinsic interpretability for LLMs, categorizing existing approaches into five design paradigms: functional transparency, concept alignment, representational decomposability, explicit modularization, and latent sparsity induction. We further discuss open challenges and outline future research directions in this emerging field. The paper list is available at: https://github.com/PKU-PILLAR-Group/Survey-Intrinsic-Interpretability-of-LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了大型语言模型内在可解释性的最新进展，将现有方法分为五个设计范式，并讨论了该新兴领域的开放挑战和未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽然性能强大，但其不透明的内部机制阻碍了可信度和安全部署。现有可解释性研究多关注事后解释方法，而内在可解释性作为直接构建透明性的替代方案正在兴起。
AI.method: 采用系统性文献综述方法，对内在可解释性研究进行分类，提出五个设计范式：功能透明性、概念对齐、表示可分解性、显式模块化和潜在稀疏性诱导。
AI.result: 建立了内在可解释性研究的分类框架，识别了五种主要设计范式，并整理了相关论文资源库供研究社区使用。
AI.conclusion: 内在可解释性为提高LLM透明度提供了有前景的途径，但仍面临诸多挑战，需要未来研究在模型设计、评估方法和实际应用等方面进一步探索。

title: MUSCAT: MUltilingual, SCientific ConversATion Benchmark
summary:
The goal of multilingual speech technology is to facilitate seamless communication between individuals speaking different languages, creating the experience as though everyone were a multilingual speaker. To create this experience, speech technology needs to address several challenges: Handling mixed multilingual input, specific vocabulary, and code-switching. However, there is currently no dataset benchmarking this situation. We propose a new benchmark to evaluate current Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems, whether they are able to handle these challenges. The benchmark consists of bilingual discussions on scientific papers between multiple speakers, each conversing in a different language. We provide a standard evaluation framework, beyond Word Error Rate (WER) enabling consistent comparison of ASR performance across languages. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed dataset is still an open challenge for state-of-the-art ASR systems. The dataset is available in https://huggingface.co/datasets/goodpiku/muscat-eval
  \\ \newline \Keywords{multilingual, speech recognition, audio segmentation, speaker diarization}

AI.tldr: 提出了一个多语言语音识别基准数据集Muscat-Eval，用于评估ASR系统处理混合语言输入、专业术语和语码转换的能力，实验表明现有先进系统仍面临挑战。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏能够评估多语言语音技术处理混合语言对话、专业词汇和语码转换能力的标准化基准数据集，这阻碍了跨语言无缝通信技术的发展。
AI.method: 构建了一个基于科学论文讨论的双语对话数据集，包含多位说话者使用不同语言交流的场景，并设计了超越词错误率的标准化评估框架。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，即使是当前最先进的自动语音识别系统，在该数据集上的表现仍存在显著困难，验证了该基准的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: Muscat-Eval数据集填补了多语言语音识别评估的空白，为未来研究提供了重要的基准测试平台，推动实现真正的跨语言无缝通信。

title: Mind's Eye: A Benchmark of Visual Abstraction, Transformation and Composition for Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive progress on vision language benchmarks, yet their capacity for visual cognitive and visuospatial reasoning remains less understood. We introduce "Mind's Eye", a multiple-choice benchmark of eight visuo-cognitive tasks inspired by classic human intelligence tests and organized under a novel "A-R-T" taxonomy: Abstraction, Relation, and Transformation. The tasks probe core processes of fluid intelligence such as pattern induction, analogical relation mapping, and mental transformation. We evaluate a diverse suite of closed-source and open-source MLLMs and compare their performance with human participants. Humans achieve 80% accuracy, while top performing MLLMs remain below 50%. Error analysis reveals failures in: (i) visual attention allocation, (ii) internal perceptual manipulation, and (iii) weak abstraction of underlying visual concepts. Our findings suggest that current MLLMs exhibit limited visuospatial reasoning capabilities, when compared with human participants, highlighting the need for more cognitively grounded evaluation frameworks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出名为'Mind's Eye'的视觉认知基准测试，评估多模态大语言模型在视觉空间推理能力上的表现，发现其远低于人类水平。
AI.motivation: 尽管多模态大语言模型在视觉语言基准测试中表现优异，但其视觉认知和视觉空间推理能力尚未得到充分理解，需要更符合认知科学的评估框架。
AI.method: 设计包含八项视觉认知任务的单选题基准测试，采用'A-R-T'分类法（抽象、关系、转换），评估多种闭源和开源MLLM模型，并与人类参与者进行对比。
AI.result: 人类平均准确率达80%，而表现最佳的MLLM模型低于50%。错误分析显示模型在视觉注意力分配、内部感知操作和视觉概念抽象方面存在缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 当前MLLM模型的视觉空间推理能力有限，与人类存在显著差距，需要开发更具认知基础的评估框架来推动该领域发展。

title: Splats in Splats++: Robust and Generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting Steganography
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has recently redefined the paradigm of 3D reconstruction, striking an unprecedented balance between visual fidelity and computational efficiency. As its adoption proliferates, safeguarding the copyright of explicit 3DGS assets has become paramount. However, existing invisible message embedding frameworks struggle to reconcile secure and high-capacity data embedding with intrinsic asset utility, often disrupting the native rendering pipeline or exhibiting vulnerability to structural perturbations. In this work, we present \textbf{\textit{Splats in Splats++}}, a unified and pipeline-agnostic steganography framework that seamlessly embeds high-capacity 3D/4D content directly within the native 3DGS representation. Grounded in a principled analysis of the frequency distribution of Spherical Harmonics (SH), we propose an importance-graded SH coefficient encryption scheme that achieves imperceptible embedding without compromising the original expressive power. To fundamentally resolve the geometric ambiguities that lead to message leakage, we introduce a \textbf{Hash-Grid Guided Opacity Mapping} mechanism. Coupled with a novel \textbf{Gradient-Gated Opacity Consistency Loss}, our formulation enforces a stringent spatial-attribute coupling between the original and hidden scenes, effectively projecting the discrete attribute mapping into a continuous, attack-resilient latent manifold. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing approaches, achieving up to \textbf{6.28 db} higher message fidelity, \textbf{3$\times$} faster rendering, and exceptional robustness against aggressive 3D-targeted structural attacks (e.g., GSPure). Furthermore, our framework exhibits remarkable versatility, generalizing seamlessly to 2D image embedding, 4D dynamic scene steganography, and diverse downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: 提出Splats in Splats++框架，在3D高斯泼溅表示中嵌入高容量3D/4D内容，实现安全隐写而不影响渲染质量
AI.motivation: 3DGS资产版权保护需求迫切，现有隐写方法难以兼顾安全嵌入、高容量和资产实用性，常破坏渲染流程或易受攻击
AI.method: 基于球谐系数频率分析的重要性分级加密方案；哈希网格引导的不透明度映射机制；梯度门控不透明度一致性损失
AI.result: 比现有方法消息保真度高6.28 dB，渲染速度快3倍，对GSPure等3D结构攻击具有强鲁棒性，可扩展到2D图像嵌入和4D动态场景
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了管道无关的隐写，在保持原始表达能力的同时确保嵌入不可感知，为3DGS资产版权保护提供了有效解决方案

title: RAGognizer: Hallucination-Aware Fine-Tuning via Detection Head Integration
summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to augment the input to Large Language Models (LLMs) with external information, such as recent or domain-specific knowledge. Nonetheless, current models still produce closed-domain hallucinations and generate content that is unsupported by the retrieved context. Current detection approaches typically treat hallucination as a post-hoc problem, relying on black-box consistency checks or probes over frozen internal representations. In this work, we demonstrate that hallucination detection based on internal state representation can also serve as a direct training signal. We introduce RAGognize, a dataset of naturally occurring closed-domain hallucinations with token-level annotations, and RAGognizer, a hallucination-aware fine-tuning approach that integrates a lightweight detection head into an LLM, allowing for the joint optimization of language modeling and hallucination detection. This joint objective forces the model to improve the separability of its internal states regarding hallucinations while simultaneously learning to generate well-formed and meaningful responses. Across multiple benchmarks, RAGognizer achieves state-of-the-art token-level hallucination detection while substantially reducing hallucination rates during generation, without degrading language quality or relevance.

AI.tldr: 提出RAGognize数据集和RAGognizer方法，通过联合优化语言建模和幻觉检测，在多个基准测试中实现最先进的幻觉检测并显著降低生成幻觉。
AI.motivation: 当前检索增强生成模型仍会产生闭域幻觉，现有检测方法多为后处理方案，缺乏直接利用内部状态表示作为训练信号的机制。
AI.method: 构建带token级标注的闭域幻觉数据集RAGognize；提出RAGognizer方法，在LLM中集成轻量检测头，联合优化语言建模和幻觉检测目标。
AI.result: RAGognizer在多个基准测试中实现最先进的token级幻觉检测，显著降低生成幻觉率，且不损害语言质量或相关性。
AI.conclusion: 将幻觉检测作为直接训练信号能有效提升模型内部状态的可分离性，同时改善生成质量，为缓解RAG系统幻觉问题提供新途径。

title: Chain-of-Thought Degrades Visual Spatial Reasoning Capabilities of Multimodal LLMs
summary: Multimodal Reasoning Models (MRMs) leveraging Chain-of-Thought (CoT) based thinking have revolutionized mathematical and logical problem-solving. However, we show that this paradigm struggles with generalized spatial intelligence. We perform a comprehensive evaluation of seventeen models across thirteen spatial benchmarks and identify a critical gap: CoT prompting consistently degrades performance in visual spatial reasoning. Furthermore, through a novel No-Image++ ablation, we demonstrate that MRMs and CoT prompted MLMs suffer from severe shortcut learning, and hallucinate visual details from textual priors even when the image is absent. These findings challenge the efficacy of text-only CoT for spatial tasks and underscore the need for vision-centric reasoning paradigms.

AI.tldr: 研究发现基于思维链的多模态推理模型在空间智能任务上表现不佳，思维链提示反而会降低视觉空间推理性能，模型存在严重的捷径学习和幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: 当前基于思维链的多模态推理模型在数学和逻辑问题上表现出色，但其在广义空间智能任务上的有效性尚未得到充分验证，需要评估这些模型在空间推理方面的实际能力。
AI.method: 对17个模型在13个空间基准测试上进行全面评估，使用思维链提示方法，并通过新颖的No-Image++消融实验分析模型行为。
AI.result: 思维链提示在视觉空间推理任务中持续降低模型性能；多模态推理模型和思维链提示的语言模型存在严重捷径学习问题；即使没有图像输入，模型也会从文本先验中幻觉出视觉细节。
AI.conclusion: 纯文本思维链方法在空间任务上效果有限，需要开发以视觉为中心的新型推理范式来解决空间智能挑战。

title: CLOTH-HUGS: Cloth Aware Human Gaussian Splatting
summary: We present Cloth-HUGS, a Gaussian Splatting based neural rendering framework for photorealistic clothed human reconstruction that explicitly disentangles body and clothing. Unlike prior methods that absorb clothing into a single body representation and struggle with loose garments and complex deformations, Cloth-HUGS represents the performer using separate Gaussian layers for body and cloth within a shared canonical space. The canonical volume jointly encodes body, cloth, and scene primitives and is deformed through SMPL-driven articulation with learned linear blend skinning weights. To improve cloth realism, we initialize cloth Gaussians from mesh topology and apply physics-inspired constraints, including simulation-consistency, ARAP regularization, and mask supervision. We further introduce a depth-aware multi-pass rendering strategy for robust body-cloth-scene compositing, enabling real-time rendering at over 60 FPS. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that Cloth-HUGS improves perceptual quality and geometric fidelity over state-of-the-art baselines, reducing LPIPS by up to 28% while producing temporally coherent cloth dynamics.

AI.tldr: Cloth-HUGS是一种基于高斯溅射的神经渲染框架，用于逼真的着装人体重建，通过分离身体和服装层实现高质量渲染
AI.motivation: 现有方法将服装与身体融合为单一表示，难以处理宽松衣物和复杂变形，需要更精细的分离表示来提升真实感
AI.method: 使用共享规范空间中的独立高斯层分别表示身体和服装，结合SMPL驱动的关节变形、物理约束（模拟一致性、ARAP正则化、掩码监督）以及深度感知多通道渲染策略
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，LPIPS降低达28%，实现超过60 FPS的实时渲染，并产生时间一致的服装动态效果
AI.conclusion: Cloth-HUGS通过显式分离身体与服装表示，结合物理约束和高效渲染策略，显著提升了着装人体重建的感知质量和几何保真度

title: SCHK-HTC: Sibling Contrastive Learning with Hierarchical Knowledge-Aware Prompt Tuning for Hierarchical Text Classification
summary: Few-shot Hierarchical Text Classification (few-shot HTC) is a challenging task that involves mapping texts to a predefined tree-structured label hierarchy under data-scarce conditions. While current approaches utilize structural constraints from the label hierarchy to maintain parent-child prediction consistency, they face a critical bottleneck, the difficulty in distinguishing semantically similar sibling classes due to insufficient domain knowledge. We introduce an innovative method named Sibling Contrastive Learning with Hierarchical Knowledge-aware Prompt Tuning for few-shot HTC tasks (SCHK-HTC). Our work enhances the model's perception of subtle differences between sibling classes at deeper levels, rather than just enforcing hierarchical rules. Specifically, we propose a novel framework featuring two core components: a hierarchical knowledge extraction module and a sibling contrastive learning mechanism. This design guides model to encode discriminative features at each hierarchy level, thus improving the separability of confusable classes. Our approach achieves superior performance across three benchmark datasets, surpassing existing state-of-the-art methods in most cases. Our code is available at https://github.com/happywinder/SCHK-HTC.

AI.tldr: 提出SCHK-HTC方法，通过层次知识提取和兄弟类对比学习解决少样本层次文本分类中语义相似兄弟类难以区分的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖标签层次结构约束保证父子预测一致性，但缺乏领域知识导致难以区分深层语义相似的兄弟类别，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 1. 层次知识提取模块：编码层级结构信息；2. 兄弟类对比学习机制：增强模型对兄弟类细微差异的感知能力；引导模型学习各层级的判别性特征。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上取得优越性能，在多数情况下超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SCHK-HTC通过增强模型对兄弟类差异的感知而非仅强制层次规则，有效提升了少样本层次文本分类中混淆类别的可区分性。

title: Early Detection of Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) Using YOLOv12 Deep Learning Model
summary: Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML) is one of the most life-threatening type of blood cancers, and its accurate classification is considered and remains a challenging task due to the visual similarity between various cell types. This study addresses the classification of the multiclasses of AML cells Utilizing YOLOv12 deep learning model. We applied two segmentation approaches based on cell and nucleus features, using Hue channel and Otsu thresholding techniques to preprocess the images prior to classification. Our experiments demonstrate that YOLOv12 with Otsu thresholding on cell-based segmentation achieved the highest level of validation and test accuracy, both reaching 99.3%.

AI.tldr: 使用YOLOv12深度学习模型对急性髓系白血病细胞进行多分类，结合细胞和细胞核特征分割方法，最高准确率达99.3%。
AI.motivation: 急性髓系白血病（AML）是一种危及生命的血癌，由于不同细胞类型间视觉相似性高，其准确分类一直具有挑战性。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv12深度学习模型，结合基于细胞和细胞核特征的两种分割方法，使用色调通道和Otsu阈值技术进行图像预处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于细胞分割的YOLOv12模型结合Otsu阈值处理，在验证集和测试集上均达到最高准确率99.3%。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv12模型结合适当的图像预处理技术，能够有效实现AML细胞的高精度多分类，为白血病诊断提供有力工具。

title: PolarMAE: Efficient Fetal Ultrasound Pre-training via Semantic Screening and Polar-Guided Masking
summary: Intelligent fetal ultrasound (US) interpretation is crucial for prenatal diagnosis, but high annotation costs and operator-induced variance make unsupervised pre-training a highly promising paradigm. However, existing pre-training methods largely ignore US-specific characteristics -- severe data redundancy, fan-shaped locality, and polar coordinate beamforming -- limiting their effectiveness in downstream tasks. To address this, we propose PolarMAE, a novel and efficient pre-training framework tailored for US images. Specifically, to mitigate continuous scanning redundancy, we introduce a Progressive Visual-Semantic Screening (PVSS) that adaptively extracts high-value samples, significantly boosting pre-training efficiency. Furthermore, we design an Acoustic-Bounded Region Constraint (ABRC) to accommodate US locality, forcing the model to focus strictly on valid acoustic regions rather than invalid dark backgrounds. Finally, leveraging the beamforming prior and local details, we propose a Polar-Texture Collaborative Masking (PTCM), enabling the model to capture underlying radial imaging patterns and critical tissue structures. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and downstream interpretation tasks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with strong pre-training scalability and efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出PolarMAE框架，针对胎儿超声图像特性进行无监督预训练，通过渐进视觉语义筛选、声学边界区域约束和极坐标纹理协同掩码，显著提升下游任务性能。
AI.motivation: 胎儿超声智能解读需要大量标注且存在操作者差异，无监督预训练是可行方案，但现有方法未充分考虑超声图像的数据冗余、扇形局部性和极坐标波束形成等特性。
AI.method: 1. 渐进视觉语义筛选（PVSS）自适应提取高价值样本；2. 声学边界区域约束（ABRC）聚焦有效声学区域；3. 极坐标纹理协同掩码（PTCM）捕捉径向成像模式和组织结构。
AI.result: 在多个数据集和下游任务上的实验表明，该方法实现了最先进的性能，并具有强大的预训练可扩展性和效率。
AI.conclusion: PolarMAE通过针对性设计有效解决了超声图像预训练中的关键挑战，为胎儿超声智能解读提供了高效解决方案。

title: Cut Your Losses! Learning to Prune Paths Early for Efficient Parallel Reasoning
summary: Parallel reasoning enhances Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) but incurs prohibitive costs due to futile paths caused by early errors. To mitigate this, path pruning at the prefix level is essential, yet existing research remains fragmented without a standardized framework. In this work, we propose the first systematic taxonomy of path pruning, categorizing methods by their signal source (internal vs. external) and learnability (learnable vs. non-learnable). This classification reveals the unexplored potential of learnable internal methods, motivating our proposal of STOP (Super TOken for Pruning). Extensive evaluations across LRMs ranging from 1.5B to 20B parameters demonstrate that STOP achieves superior effectiveness and efficiency compared to existing baselines. Furthermore, we rigorously validate the scalability of STOP under varying compute budgets - for instance, boosting GPT-OSS-20B accuracy on AIME25 from 84% to nearly 90% under fixed compute budgets. Finally, we distill our findings into formalized empirical guidelines to facilitate optimal real-world deployment. Code, data and models are available at https://bijiaxihh.github.io/STOP

AI.tldr: 提出首个路径剪枝系统分类法，并基于此开发了STOP方法，通过可学习的内部信号提升大推理模型的并行推理效率。
AI.motivation: 并行推理虽能增强大推理模型，但早期错误导致的无效路径会产生高昂计算成本，而现有路径剪枝研究缺乏统一框架，特别是可学习的内部方法潜力未被充分探索。
AI.method: 提出路径剪枝分类法（按信号来源分为内部/外部，按可学习性分为可学习/不可学习），并设计STOP方法——利用可学习的内部超令牌进行前缀级路径剪枝。
AI.result: 在1.5B至20B参数的大推理模型上验证，STOP在效果和效率上均优于基线；例如在固定计算预算下，将GPT-OSS-20B在AIME25上的准确率从84%提升至近90%。
AI.conclusion: STOP证明了可学习内部剪枝方法的有效性，研究还总结了实证指南以促进实际部署，相关代码、数据和模型已开源。

title: Stochasticity in Tokenisation Improves Robustness
summary: The widespread adoption of large language models (LLMs) has increased concerns about their robustness. Vulnerabilities in perturbations of tokenisation of the input indicate that models trained with a deterministic canonical tokenisation can be brittle to adversarial attacks. Recent studies suggest that stochastic tokenisation can deliver internal representations that are less sensitive to perturbations. In this paper, we analyse how stochastic tokenisations affect robustness to adversarial attacks and random perturbations. We systematically study this over a range of learning regimes (pre-training, supervised fine-tuning, and in-context learning), data sets, and model architectures. We show that pre-training and fine-tuning with uniformly sampled stochastic tokenisations improve robustness to random and adversarial perturbations. Evaluating on uniformly sampled non-canonical tokenisations reduces the accuracy of a canonically trained Llama-1b model by 29.8%. We find that training with stochastic tokenisation preserves accuracy without increasing inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机分词对大型语言模型鲁棒性的影响，发现预训练和微调时使用均匀采样的随机分词能提升模型对随机和对抗性扰动的鲁棒性，且不增加推理成本。
AI.motivation: 大规模语言模型的广泛使用引发了对鲁棒性的担忧，确定性规范分词训练的模型易受对抗攻击影响，而随机分词可能提供更稳健的内部表示。
AI.method: 系统研究了不同学习机制（预训练、监督微调、上下文学习）、数据集和模型架构，使用均匀采样的随机分词进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 随机分词训练将Llama-1b模型在非规范分词评估中的准确率下降从29.8%减少到可接受水平，同时保持推理效率。
AI.conclusion: 随机分词是一种有效提升语言模型鲁棒性的方法，能抵御分词扰动攻击，且无需额外推理开销。

title: Can LLMs Understand the Impact of Trauma? Costs and Benefits of LLMs Coding the Interviews of Firearm Violence Survivors
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics (2026)
summary: Firearm violence is a pressing public health issue, yet research into survivors' lived experiences remains underfunded and difficult to scale. Qualitative research, including in-depth interviews, is a valuable tool for understanding the personal and societal consequences of community firearm violence and designing effective interventions. However, manually analyzing these narratives through thematic analysis and inductive coding is time-consuming and labor-intensive. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have opened the door to automating this process, though concerns remain about whether these models can accurately and ethically capture the experiences of vulnerable populations. In this study, we assess the use of open-source LLMs to inductively code interviews with 21 Black men who have survived community firearm violence. Our results demonstrate that while some configurations of LLMs can identify important codes, overall relevance remains low and is highly sensitive to data processing. Furthermore, LLM guardrails lead to substantial narrative erasure. These findings highlight both the potential and limitations of LLM-assisted qualitative coding and underscore the ethical challenges of applying AI in research involving marginalized communities.

AI.tldr: 评估开源大语言模型在分析枪支暴力幸存者访谈中的表现，发现模型虽能识别部分重要编码，但整体相关性低、对数据处理敏感，且伦理护栏导致叙事擦除。
AI.motivation: 枪支暴力是紧迫的公共卫生问题，但幸存者经历的研究资金不足且难以规模化。传统质性分析方法耗时耗力，而大语言模型为自动化分析提供可能，但需验证其能否准确、伦理地处理弱势群体数据。
AI.method: 使用开源大语言模型对21名经历社区枪支暴力的黑人男性幸存者访谈进行归纳式编码，评估模型在不同数据处理配置下的表现。
AI.result: 模型某些配置能识别重要编码，但整体编码相关性较低，且结果对数据处理方式高度敏感；模型的伦理护栏机制导致大量叙事内容被擦除。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型辅助质性编码具有潜力但存在明显局限，在边缘化群体研究中应用人工智能需谨慎应对伦理挑战。

title: Efficient Video Diffusion Models: Advancements and Challenges
summary: Video diffusion models have rapidly become the dominant paradigm for high-fidelity generative video synthesis, but their practical deployment remains constrained by severe inference costs. Compared with image generation, video synthesis compounds computation across spatial-temporal token growth and iterative denoising, making attention and memory traffic major bottlenecks in real-world settings. This survey provides a systematic and deployment-oriented review of efficient video diffusion models. We propose a unified categorization that organizes existing methods into four classes of main paradigms, including step distillation, efficient attention, model compression, and cache/trajectory optimization. Building on this categorization, we respectively analyze algorithmic trends of these four paradigms and examine how different design choices target two core objectives: reducing the number of function evaluations and minimizing per-step overhead. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including quality preservation under composite acceleration, hardware-software co-design, robust real-time long-horizon generation, and open infrastructure for standardized evaluation. To the best of our knowledge, our work is the first comprehensive survey on efficient video diffusion models, offering researchers and engineers a structured overview of the field and its emerging research directions.

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了高效视频扩散模型的研究进展，提出了四类主要范式，分析了算法趋势与设计选择，并讨论了未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 视频扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频，但推理成本高昂，时空token增长与迭代去噪导致注意力与内存成为实际部署的主要瓶颈，需要系统性的效率优化方法。
AI.method: 提出统一分类框架，将现有方法归纳为四类范式：步骤蒸馏、高效注意力、模型压缩、缓存/轨迹优化，并分析各类方法如何减少函数评估次数与降低单步开销。
AI.result: 建立了首个高效视频扩散模型的系统性综述框架，明确了不同优化范式的核心目标与设计逻辑，为研究者与工程师提供了结构化领域概览。
AI.conclusion: 未来需关注复合加速下的质量保持、软硬件协同设计、鲁棒实时长序列生成、标准化评估基础设施等方向，推动视频扩散模型的实用化部署。

title: AeroDeshadow: Physics-Guided Shadow Synthesis and Penumbra-Aware Deshadowing for Aerospace Imagery
summary: Shadows are prevalent in high-resolution aerospace imagery (ASI). They often cause spectral distortion and information loss, which degrade downstream interpretation tasks. While deep learning methods have advanced natural-image shadow removal, their direct application to ASI faces two primary challenges. First, strictly paired training data are severely lacking. Second, homogeneous shadow assumptions fail to handle the broad penumbra transition zones inherent in aerospace scenes. To address these issues, we propose AeroDeshadow, a unified two-stage framework integrating physics-guided shadow synthesis and penumbra-aware restoration. In the first stage, a Physics-aware Degradation Shadow Synthesis Network (PDSS-Net) explicitly models illumination decay and spatial attenuation. This process constructs AeroDS-Syn, a large-scale paired dataset featuring soft boundary transitions. Constrained by this physical formulation, a Penumbra-aware Cascaded DeShadowing Network (PCDS-Net) then decouples the input into umbra and penumbra components. By restoring these regions progressively, PCDS-Net alleviates boundary artifacts and over-correction. Trained solely on the synthetic AeroDS-Syn, the network generalizes to real-world ASI without requiring paired real annotations. Experimental results indicate that AeroDeshadow achieves state-of-the-art quantitative accuracy and visual fidelity across synthetic and real-world datasets. The datasets and code will be made publicly available at: https://github.com/AeroVILab-AHU/AeroDeshadow.

AI.tldr: 提出AeroDeshadow框架，通过物理引导的阴影合成和半影感知修复，解决航空影像中阴影去除的配对数据缺乏和宽过渡带处理难题。
AI.motivation: 航空影像中的阴影会导致光谱失真和信息丢失，影响后续解译任务。现有深度学习方法面临两大挑战：缺乏严格配对的训练数据，以及传统均匀阴影假设无法处理航空场景中广泛存在的半影过渡带。
AI.method: 提出两阶段框架：1) PDSS-Net通过显式建模光照衰减和空间衰减，构建具有软边界过渡的大规模合成配对数据集AeroDS-Syn；2) PCDS-Net将输入解耦为本影和半影分量，通过渐进式修复减轻边界伪影和过度校正。
AI.result: 仅使用合成数据训练的模型在合成和真实航空影像数据集上均达到最先进的定量精度和视觉保真度，且无需真实配对标注即可泛化到真实场景。
AI.conclusion: AeroDeshadow通过物理引导的阴影合成和半影感知修复，有效解决了航空影像阴影去除的数据和过渡带处理问题，具有实际应用价值。

title: Stylistic-STORM (ST-STORM) : Perceiving the Semantic Nature of Appearance
comment: 20 pages, 16 figures, ICPR 2026 (28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition)
summary: One of the dominant paradigms in self-supervised learning (SSL), illustrated by MoCo or DINO, aims to produce robust representations by capturing features that are insensitive to certain image transformations such as illumination, or geometric changes. This strategy is appropriate when the objective is to recognize objects independently of their appearance. However, it becomes counterproductive as soon as appearance itself constitutes the discriminative signal.
